rows.ko\n社群收藏分享：超夢卡價達380u，二級市場切入建議與Renaiss註冊連: 커뮤니티 수집 공유: 초몽 카드 가격 380u 도달, 2차 시장 진입 제안 및 Renaiss 등록 링크
rows.ko\nRenaiss社群成員分享於平台收到一張超夢卡，該卡目前市場價格約380: Renaiss 커뮤니티 멤버가 플랫폼에서 뮤투 카드를 한 장 받았다고 공유했습니다. 해당 카드의 현재 시장 가격은 약 380u입니다. 작가가 오프라인에서 수령한 두 장은 이미 현저한 상승을 보이고 있습니다. 운이 없어 당첨되지 못한 플레이어에게는 2층 시장의 동향을 관찰하고 적절한 때에 진입할 것을 권장합니다. 아직 가입하지 않은 사용자에게는 아래 링크를 통해 플랫폼에 가입할 수 있도록 알리며, 공식이 조속히 물리 카드 수령 서비스를 개방하기를 기대합니다. 이 공유는 Renaiss 뮤투 카드 2차 시장의 수요가 뜨겁다는 것을 반영하며, 포켓몬 물리 카드 동향에 관심을 가진 플레이어에게 참고할 가치가 있습니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss超夢卡二級市場報價約380u，近期價格持續上漲: Renaiss 초몽카드 2차 시장 시세는 약 380u, 최근 가격이 지속적으로 상승하고 있다
rows.ko\n運氣不佳者可留意二樓市場行情，評估進場時機: 운이 좋지 않은 사람들은 2층 시장의 상황을 주시하고 진입 시기를 평가하세요
rows.ko\n尚未註冊者可用推文內連結加入，關注實體卡領取開放時間: 아직 가입하지 않은 사람은 트윗 내 링크를 사용하여 가입할 수 있으며, 실물 카드 수령 시작 시간을 확인하세요
rows.ko\n活動 社群收藏分享：超夢卡價達380u，二級市場切入建議與Renaiss: 이벤트 커뮤니티 찜 공유： 초몽카드 가격이 380u에 도달，2차 시장 진입 제안 및 Renaiss 등록 링크，등록과 장소 정보를 추적할 것을 권장합니다.
rows.ko\n香港TCG Tour卡店實況 現場開箱氣氛活躍: 홍콩 TCG Tour 카드숍 현장 실황 라이브 개봉 분위기 활발
rows.ko\n近 7 天官方重點集中在 SBT 與積分機制、SBT 快照門檻更新、香港: 최근 7일 동안 공식 중점은 SBT와 적분 메커니즘, SBT 스냅샷 임계값 업데이트, 홍콩 Web3 Festival 일정, 업데이트 유형은 기능 5, 공지 5, 커뮤니티 1, 시장 1이 주를 이루고 있습니다. 전반적으로 보면, 현재 공식은 활동 참여와 기능 롤아웃을 동시에 추진하고 있어, 플레이어에게 가장 직접적인 영향은 활동 일정, 참여 임계값, 이후 기능 개방 조건을 동시에 주시해야 한다는 것입니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方在 04/26 釋出「OMEGA Pack 補貨首位: Renaiss 공식은 04/26에 'OMEGA Pack 재입고 첫 번째 S카드 보유자가 등장하고 기념 SBT를 발행했다'고 밝혔으며, 필드는 추후 공식 보충 예정입니다. 핵심 이벤트는 SBT와 적분 메커니즘으로, 플레이어의 향후 오퍼레이션 템포에 영향을 미칠 예정이므로, 개방 조건과 시간을 미리 확인해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方在 04/27 釋出「SuperLiquid Bet: Renaiss 공식은 04/27에 "SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 포인트 임계값 업데이트 및 스냅샷 알림"을 출시했으며, 장소는 공식 추가 대기 중입니다. 핵심 이벤트는 SBT 스냅샷 임계값 업데이트로, 플레이어의 후속 작업 리듬에 영향을 미치므로 조기에 공개 조건과 시간을 확인해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方在 04/25 釋出「Region Royale 邀: Renaiss 공식은 04/25에 "Region Royale 초대 전투: 아시아 5개국 커뮤니티 대회 참가 신청 중"을 출시했으며, 장소는 공식 추가 대기 중입니다. 핵심 이벤트는 오프라인 커뮤니티 모임으로, 플레이어의 후속 작업 리듬에 영향을 미치므로 조기에 공개 조건과 시간을 확인해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方在 04/24 釋出「Legacy Pack 8.0: Renaiss 공식은 04/24에 "Legacy Pack 8.0이 1시간 후에 출시됩니다"를 출시했으며, 장소는 온라인 커뮤니티입니다. 핵심 이벤트는 카드 팩 및 뽑기 성능으로, 플레이어의 후속 작업 리듬에 영향을 미치므로 조기에 공개 조건과 시간을 확인해야 합니다.
rows.en\n春季資訊刊｜2026 年春季 TCG 快訊：Omega Pack 再補、: Spring Issue｜2026 Spring TCG News: Omega Pack Restocked, Legacy Pack 8.0 Sold Out, Region Royale Asia Invitational Starting Soon
rows.en\n本週官方更新顯示，Omega Pack 補貨已於首批 S 卡問世，並同步: This week's official update shows that the Omega Pack restock has debuted with the first batch of S cards, and a commemorative SBT has been issued simultaneously; on April 26, an additional restock added more than ten S-level cards; Legacy Pack 8.0 officially launched and sold out within 22 minutes, reflecting high player demand. The Top 1% score threshold for SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 has been raised to 7,100 points, making the challenge more difficult. Meanwhile, the Region Royale Asia Invitational is about to start, and the One Piece Card Battle Arena has opened registration with a deadline.
rows.en\nOmega Pack 補貨上架，首批 S 卡出爐且紀念 SBT 同步發放: Omega Pack restocked, the first batch of S cards released and commemorative SBT issued simultaneously, plus more than ten S-level cards added.
rows.en\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 Top 1% 積分門檻升至 7: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 Top 1% score threshold has risen to 7,100 points; top players need to prepare in advance.
rows.en\nRegion Royale 亞洲邀請賽即將開戰，海賊王卡牌對戰 Aren: The Region Royale Asia Invitational is about to begin; registration for the Pirate King card battle Arena has been extended to April 30, and the Legacy Pack 8.0 sold-out frenzy continues.
rows.en\nOMEGA Pack 補貨上架首批S卡出爐並頒發紀念SBT: OMEGA Pack restocked; the first batch of S cards released and commemorative SBT awarded.
rows.en\nRenaiss官方宣布OMEGA Pack卡包已完成補貨，五位用戶率先開: Renaiss official announced that the OMEGA Pack has completed restocking, with five users being the first to open rare S‑Card cards. To celebrate this milestone, the official simultaneously minted limited SBTs for eligible users to claim, symbolizing the special achievements of early participants. This update is an official product sales update, not a traditional marketing campaign, aimed at collectors interested in purchasing packs or following S‑Card rarity. It is recommended to follow the official account to stay updated on future restocks and SBT claim opportunities.
rows.en\nOMEGA Pack卡包已重新上架，想入手的用戶可前往官方頁面購買: The OMEGA Pack has been re‑listed; users who want to get it can go to the official page to purchase.
rows.en\n首批5位幸運用戶已開出S卡，恭喜名單內用戶盡快查看自己的S卡: The first batch of 5 lucky users have opened S‑Cards; congratulations to the users on the list, please check your S‑Card as soon as possible.
rows.en\n限量SBT已開放領取，符合資格的收藏者可至指定連結完成claim: Limited SBT is now open for claiming; eligible collectors can complete the claim via the designated link.
rows.en\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 積分門檻更新：Top 1% 需: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 points threshold update: Top 1% must reach 7,100 points.
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方公布 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 新積: Renaiss officially announced the SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 new point thresholds: Bronze (Top 40%) is 180 points, Silver (Top 10%) is 1,160 points, Gold (Top 1%) is 7,100 points. With less than a day until the snapshot, competition pressure intensifies causing scores to keep rising. Users holding Beta SBT need to immediately verify whether their point position meets the target threshold; the next step should be to catch up on points before the snapshot.
rows.en\n快照時間為 4 月 27 日凌晨 3:00（GMT+8），需在此之前確認: The snapshot is scheduled for April 27 at 03:00 (GMT+8), and points must be confirmed to meet the target before that.
rows.en\nGold 門檻需達 7,100 分，競爭激烈下分數仍在上升: The Gold threshold requires reaching 7,100 points, and under fierce competition the scores are still rising.
rows.en\n持有 Beta SBT 的用戶應即時查看排名儀表板追蹤自己的位置: Users holding Beta SBT should immediately check the ranking dashboard to track their position.
rows.en\n海賊王卡牌對戰活動截止時間延長至4月30日: The One Piece card battle event deadline has been extended to April 30.
rows.en\n海賊王卡牌遊戲（OPTCG）對戰活動的紀錄指針領取期限從原訂時間延長至2: The deadline for collecting the Log Pose in the One Piece card game (OPTCG) battle event has been extended from the originally scheduled time to April 30, 2026 at 23:59 (UTC+8), giving players who have not yet claimed it more time to participate. The organizers have also added yyclub as a battle platform, operating in parallel with the existing OPTCGsim. Players must actively contact the organizers to arrange battles; this is the final chance to participate before the event ends, and missing it will mean you cannot obtain the Log Pose reward.
rows.en\n對戰截止時間為2026/04/30 23:59，逾期未完成將失去領取資格: The battle deadline is 2026/04/30 23:59; failure to complete will result in loss of claim eligibility.
rows.en\n現已支援OPTCGsim與yyclub兩平台，玩家可任選熟悉的方式參與: Now supports OPTCGsim and yyclub platforms; players can choose whichever platform they are familiar with to participate.
rows.en\n立即聯繫0x1001或另一位帳號安排對戰時間，避免錯過最後窗口: Contact 0x1001 or another account immediately to schedule the battle time, so you don't miss the final window.
rows.en\n活動 海賊王卡牌對戰活動截止時間延長至4月30日，時間 30、23:59: Event: The One Piece card battle event deadline has been extended to April 30, time 30, 23:59, UTC+8. It is recommended to arrange participation in advance.
rows.en\nRenaiss 宣布 Region Royale 亞洲邀請賽即將開戰: Renaiss announces that the Region Royale Asian Invitational is about to begin
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方正式預告 Region Royale 邀請賽將在韓國: Renaiss officially announced that the Region Royale Invitational will be held simultaneously in five regions: South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, and Taiwan. This competition focuses on growth and community expansion, aiming to attract new users and strengthen cohesion among local communities. The officials stated that rewards are ready, and called out to enthusiasts across regions with "Get your region ready", implying fierce competition and user recruitment efforts in each region. Participants who are interested need to keep tracking the subsequent registration or invitation mechanisms for detailed information.
rows.en\n持續關注 Renaiss 官方公告，等待五國區域賽的具體報名與參與方式: Continuously follow Renaiss official announcements, awaiting the specific registration and participation methods for the five-country regional competition.
rows.en\n聯繫當地社群或戰隊，了解是否有內部推薦或邀請名額: Contact local community or team to find out if there are internal referral or invitation slots.
rows.en\n追蹤官方動態與社群討論，掌握獎勵內容與競賽規則詳情: Track official updates and community discussions to master the reward details and competition rule specifics.
rows.en\n功能進度 Renaiss 宣布 Region Royale 亞洲邀請賽即: Feature update: Renaiss announces that the Region Royale Asia Invitational will start soon; stay tuned for the next official announcement.
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方與 Portaldot 聯合舉辦 Poker Nig: Renaiss official and Portaldot jointly host the Poker Night event, which will officially start at 8 PM tonight; registration is already open. Participants have the chance to split a 200 USDT prize pool, and the top ten will also receive Pokémon M3 card packs as exclusive rewards. This event is community-oriented, combining casual competition and card collection rewards, suitable for players and collectors interested in on-chain interaction to track registration status and tournament progress in real time.
rows.en\n今晚8點前完成報名，報名連結：https://t.co/SCqjRMQu: Complete registration before 8 PM tonight, registration link: https://t.co/SCqjRMQunr
rows.en\n前十名可獲得寶可夢 M3 卡包，非錢包獎勵需至 Community Ev: The top ten can receive Pokémon M3 card packs, non-wallet rewards must be claimed at the Community Event
rows.en\n總獎池包含200 USDT，由 Portaldot 提供，詳情可至活動頁: The total prize pool includes 200 USDT, provided by Portaldot, for details check the event page
rows.en\nOmega Pack 4月26日補貨 新增逾十張S級卡牌: Omega Pack restocked on April 26, adding over ten S-level cards.
rows.en\nRenaiss官方宣布Omega Pack將於4月26日下午三時（UTC: Renaiss officially announced that the Omega Pack will restock and return at 3 PM (UTC+8) on April 26, with more than ten new S-level cards added, among which the top-tier card is valued at over one thousand US dollars. To encourage participation, the official set a threshold: players must draw at least one Omega Pack before the end of May to unlock the Omega Restock SBT qualification. As the ten million milestone approaches, this restock is viewed as a key move to stimulate market liquidity.
rows.en\nOmega Pack於4月26日下午3時（UTC+8）開放購買，詳情請關: The Omega Pack opens for purchase at 3 PM (UTC+8) on April 26; for details, please follow the official website announcement.
rows.en\n新卡組包含逾十張S級卡牌，單張最高價值逾一千美元，建議關注二級市場走勢: The new card set contains over ten S-level cards, with the highest individual value exceeding one thousand US dollars; it is recommended to keep an eye on the secondary market trends.
rows.en\n需在5月底前完成至少一次抽取才可領取Omega Restock SBT，: You must complete at least one draw before the end of May to claim the Omega Restock SBT; please note the claim deadline.
rows.en\nLegacy Pack 8.0 22分鐘完售感謝支持: Legacy Pack 8.0 sold out in 22 minutes, thank you for your support.
rows.en\nRenaiss官方宣布Legacy Pack 8.0上架後22分鐘內完售: Renaiss officially announced that Legacy Pack 8.0 sold out within 22 minutes after launch, once again setting a record for rapid sell‑outs. This achievement reflects the continued enthusiasm of the collector market for Renaiss products, showing that the limited‑edition strategy remains attractive. Next steps can include tracking the timing of subsequent card pack releases and market price trends.
rows.en\nLegacy Pack 8.0 已全數完售，成交時間為上架後22分鐘: Legacy Pack 8.0 has been fully sold out, with the transaction occurring 22 minutes after listing.
rows.en\n官方對社群支持表達感謝，並預告將有後續產品: The official thanked the community for its support and previewed upcoming products.
rows.en\n建議追蹤後續卡包公告與二級市場報價變化: Recommend tracking subsequent pack announcements and secondary market price changes.
rows.en\n限量卡包完售: Limited edition card pack sold out
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方宣布 Legacy Pack 第八版已開放鑄造與交易: Renaiss officially announced that Legacy Pack version 8 has been opened for minting and trading; users can immediately claim or purchase new card packs through the platform interface. This version is a regular version update, not a limited-time event, mainly affecting existing collectors and pack investors; later, users can pay attention to whether the official releases rarity distribution or special card information.
rows.en\n打開 Renaiss 平台即可查看並交易 Legacy Pack 8.0: Open the Renaiss platform to view and trade Legacy Pack 8.0
rows.en\n關注官方公告了解新版本稀有卡分布與鑄造限制: Follow official announcements to learn about the distribution of rare cards and the minting restrictions in the new version.
rows.en\n收藏者可評估是否將新卡包納入現有投資組合: Collectors can assess whether to incorporate the new card packs into their current investment portfolio.
rows.en\n功能進度 卡包與抽卡表現，時間節點 live now，留意開放條件。: Feature progress: card pack and draw performance, time node live now, watch for the opening conditions.
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方 這則屬於功能更新，核心為「Legacy Pack: Renaiss official: This is a feature update, with the core being the "Legacy Pack" card pack new release and price range update. The main timeline is live now. The direct impact on users is that this update will affect subsequent usage processes, and you need to follow the next official details.
rows.en\nRenaiss 感謝參與香港 Web3 Festival 系列活動，CE: Renaiss thanks for participating in the Hong Kong Web3 Festival series of events; CEO SBT is open for claiming.
rows.en\nRenaiss 在香港 Web3 Festival 期間參與多場活動，包: During the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, Renaiss participated in multiple events, including BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and HK TCG Tour, and thanks the community members for their support. The official also announced that the activity participation proof SBT is now open for claiming, serving as a unique memento of this offline series of interactions and the basis for future rights.
rows.en\nBNB Chain Super Meetup、RWA Night、HK: Participants of the BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and HK TCG Tour can check their wallet to confirm receipt of SBT.
rows.en\nCEO SBT 領取方式為與 CEO 合影並張貼至指定推文串（https: The CEO SBT claim method is to take a photo with the CEO and post it to the designated tweet thread (https://t.co/UWDsI1uN28).
rows.en\n若尚未 claim SBT，建議近日留意錢包通知或至 Renaiss 官: If you have not yet claimed SBT, it is recommended to keep an eye on wallet notifications or check the Renaiss website for the claim deadline.
rows.en\nRenaiss 香港 TCG 巡禮圓滿落幕: Renaiss Hong Kong TCG Tour Successfully Concludes
rows.en\nRenaiss 在 Web3 Festival 期間於香港舉辦為期兩天的: Renaiss hosted a two-day TCG exploration tour in Hong Kong during the Web3 Festival, leading the community through local trading card hubs such as Mong Kok Sino Centre and Silver City Plaza, and praying for "Divine Pack" blessings at Wong Tai Sin Temple for unopened card packs. The CEO personally hosted participants in opening Pokemon, One Piece, and various series box cards, with multilingual players gathering on site to exchange collection insights and market observations. Officials stated that the event aims to link physical card culture with on-chain collectibles while expanding liquidity and participation channels.
rows.en\n巡禮路線橫跨信和中心、銀城廣場等香港集換式卡牌集散地，展現當地市場密度: The tour route spanned Mong Kok Sino Centre, Silver City Plaza, and other Hong Kong trading card distribution hubs, showcasing the local market density.
rows.en\n黃大仙祠「God Pack」祝福環節為未拆封卡包進行傳統儀式，增添文化特: The 'God Pack' blessing segment at Wong Tai Sin Temple performed a traditional ritual on sealed card packs, adding cultural flair.
rows.en\nCEO 現場招待開箱寶可夢、航海王等盒卡促進跨系列收藏交流: The CEO hosted on‑site openings of Pokémon, One Piece, and other card packs to promote cross‑series collection exchanges.
rows.en\nRenaiss × Portaldot 線上撲克夜報名中，獎池含200: Renaiss × Portaldot Online Poker Night registration open, prize pool includes 200 USDT and M3 card packs
rows.en\nRenaiss與Portaldot聯合舉辦線上撲克競賽，定於4月24日晚: Renaiss and Portaldot jointly host an online poker competition, scheduled to start at 7:00 PM on April 24 (UTC+8) on the lepoker.io platform. The event offers a 200 USDT prize pool for participants to split, and will award Pokemon M3 card packs to the Top 10 players, while all Top 100 finishers will receive a Community Event SBT. Players can pre‑register via the official registration link, and the event combines community interaction and technical exchange, suitable for members interested in Web3 and card games.
rows.en\n即日起至4月24日可透過lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy完成報名: From now until April 24, you can complete registration via lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy, and you must have a platform account.
rows.en\n競賽獎池包含200 USDT（供全體參與者瓜分）及寶可夢M3卡包（僅限前: The competition prize pool includes 200 USDT (to be split among all participants) and Pokémon M3 card packs (only for the top 10).
rows.en\nTop 100完賽者將獲得Renaiss社區活動SBT，可留意錢包領取資: Top 100 finishers will receive a Renaiss community event SBT; please check your wallet for the eligibility to claim.
rows.en\nLegacy Pack 8.0限量開包活動4月24日登場: Legacy Pack 8.0 Limited Pack Opening Event Debuts on April 24
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方釋出「SBT 快照門檻更新」活動資訊。時間為 3:0: Renaiss officially released the "SBT Snapshot Threshold Update" event information. Time is 3:00 AM, 3:00. Location is online (Discord / Live). Main incentives are SBT and points. SBT acquisition: reach top 40%: 170 points, top 10%: 930 points, top 1%: 4900 points, snapshot time 27 Apr, 3:00 AM. This type of activity has clear incentives, usually increasing participation rates and community expansion.
rows.en\n活動重點：SBT 分位門檻與快照時間更新: Event highlight: SBT percentile thresholds and snapshot time update
rows.en\n時間與地點：3:00 AM、3:00／線上（Discord / Live: Time and location: 3:00 AM, 3:00 / Online (Discord / Live)
rows.en\n活動 SBT 快照門檻更新，時間 3:00 AM、3:00，重點獎勵 S: Event SBT snapshot threshold updated, time 3:00 AM, 3:00, key rewards SBT, points.
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方 這則活動主軸是「SBT 分位門檻與快照時間更新」，: Renaiss Official: The main theme of this event is "SBT percentile threshold and snapshot time update", time at 3:00 AM, 3:00, location at Online (Discord / Live), main incentives are SBT and points, participation method is live stream and activity participation. Such events have clear incentives, usually increasing participation rate and community expansion.
rows.en\n活動主軸：SBT 分位門檻與快照時間更新: Main theme: SBT percentile threshold and snapshot time update
rows.en\n參與方式：直播、參與活動: Participation method: Live stream, event participation
rows.en\nRenaiss 上線 MFA 多因素驗證 支援 Privy 登入: Renaiss launches MFA multi-factor authentication, supporting Privy login
rows.en\nRenaiss 正式啟用 MFA 多因素驗證功能，透過 Privy 登入: Renaiss officially enables MFA multi-factor authentication; users logging in via Privy can bind an authenticator app to generate a 6-digit verification code, reducing the risk of account theft. This update affects all Privy login users; it is recommended to go to the settings page immediately to enable MFA for additional security protection.
rows.en\n透過 Privy 登入的用戶可至設定頁面啟用 MFA: Users who log in via Privy can go to the settings page to enable MFA.
rows.en\n綁定驗證器 app 後產生 6 位數驗證碼保護帳戶: After binding the authenticator app, a 6-digit verification code is generated to protect the account.
rows.en\n立即啟用 MFA 防止帳戶遭未授權登入: Enable MFA immediately to prevent unauthorized login to the account.
rows.en\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 階段性結束，SBT 資格門檻出: Superliquid Beta 2.0 Phase Ends, SBT Qualification Threshold Revealed
rows.en\nRenaiss 官方公告 Superliquid Beta 2.0 即將: Renaiss officially announces that Superliquid Beta 2.0 will soon end, and all participants' points will be reset in the next phase. The ranking in Beta 2.0 will determine the SBT tier you can claim, which is divided into three tiers: Elite (rank must be in the top 40%), Prime (top 10%), and Apex (top 1%). Users holding the corresponding SBT will get early access to new features; it is advised that all participants verify their current ranking progress and qualification status.
rows.en\n確認目前 Beta 2.0 積分排名是否達到 Elite SBT 的前百: Confirm whether your current Beta 2.0 points ranking meets the top 40% threshold for Elite SBT.
rows.en\n下一階段積分將重置，欲衝 Prime（前百分之十）或 Apex（前百分之: The next stage points will be reset; to aim for Prime (top 10%) or Apex (top 1%), you need to re-plan.
rows.en\n持有 Elite、Prime 或 Apex 等級 SBT 可搶先體驗新功: Holders of Elite, Prime, or Apex tier SBT can experience new features early; it is recommended to stay tuned for subsequent claim announcements.
rows.en\n香港TCG Tour 現場直播：神秘大方玩家請全團開盒: Hong Kong TCG Tour Live Stream: Mysterious generous player treats the whole team to opening boxes
rows.en\nRenaiss官方帳號在直播中發布香港TCG Tour現場實況，一位名為: Renaiss official account posted live footage of the Hong Kong TCG Tour during the stream. A participant named @Plus_Ultra_715 generously paid the bill, treating the whole group to opening boxes of One Piece, Pokémon, Digimon and other card game products. Everyone kept pulling great cards, creating a joyful atmosphere. This event showcases the cohesion of offline community gatherings and the thrill of random surprises, drawing onlookers into the hot on‑site atmosphere. We can look forward to whether the organizers will release more Tour clips or the next leg of the tour.
rows.en\n直播中@Plus_Ultra_715請全團開One Piece/寶可夢/: During the stream, @Plus_Ultra_715 treated the whole group to opening boxes of One Piece, Pokémon, Digimon and other card games.
rows.en\n現場接連開出好卡，官方帳號已置頂該則直播文: Great cards keep appearing on site, and the official account has pinned that livestream post.
rows.en\n香港為Tour首站，後續行程與下一站資訊可追蹤官方公告: Hong Kong is the first stop of the Tour; follow the official announcement for the subsequent itinerary and next stop information.
rows.en\nGate與Red Bull聯手舉辦「Racing the Future」: Gate and Red Bull jointly present the 'Racing the Future' exhibition.
rows.en\nGate攜手Red Bull於2026年4月18日至24日在香港K11: Gate and Red Bull will launch the 'Racing the Future' exhibition at Hong Kong's K11 MUSEA from April 18 to 24, 2026, celebrating Gate's 13th anniversary. The venue will feature Red Bull Racing and F1-themed installations, limited-edition co-branded gifts, and visitors can enjoy a close-up view of the racing displays. Interested participants must reserve a spot in advance via the Luma platform; when applying for VIP or partner tickets, please fill in 'Renaiss' as the company field. This event is a physical exhibition within the Web3 Festival period, suitable for blockchain professionals, racing enthusiasts, and investors to network.
rows.en\n展期為2026年4月18日至24日，開放時間每日10時至22時: The exhibition runs from April 18 to 24, 2026, with daily opening hours from 10:00 to 22:00.
rows.en\n地點在香港尖沙咀K11 MUSEA，採免費入場但需預約: Location is at Hong Kong Tsim Sha Tsui K11 MUSEA, free admission but requires reservation.
rows.en\n申請VIP票須填寫「Renaiss」，報名連結為luma.com/bb5: To apply for VIP tickets, you must fill in "Renaiss", registration link is luma.com/bb5l9oa4.
rows.en\nCommunity Rip Pack Event：One Piece 卡: Community Rip Pack Event: One Piece card pack opening live stream showdown.
rows.en\nDiscord 頻道 @0x1001 宣布舉辦 Community Ri: Discord channel @0x1001 announces the Community Rip Pack Event, where 5 participants will open packs of the One Piece card game in a live Discord stream on April 16 at 9 PM (UTC+8), each opening 3 boxes (total 72 packs) to compete for rarity. All viewers who participate in voting interactions can obtain the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT, and voters have a chance to win the official OP-15 pack. This event provides a viewing and interactive experience for One Piece card enthusiasts, suitable for players interested in joining the community and collecting SBTs.
rows.en\n4月16日晚間9點（UTC+8）加入 Discord 直播觀看開包對決，: Join the Discord live stream on April 16 at 9 PM (UTC+8) to watch the pack opening showdown and participate in voting to predict the top three winners.
rows.en\n投票者可獲得 Community Rip Pack Event Surv: Voters can obtain the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT and have a chance to win an OP-15 pack.
rows.en\n追蹤 @0x1001 頻道以接收活動報名表與直播通知: Follow @0x1001 channel to receive event registration forms and live stream notifications
rows.en\nRenaiss 集運攻略：運費+稅金比較與寄送步驟: Renaiss Consolidated Shipping Guide: Shipping Fees + Tax Comparison and Shipping Steps
rows.en\n社群成員整理三大集運方案供台灣玩家參考，指出直送台灣需負擔運費與進口稅金: Community members compiled three major consolidated shipping options for Taiwanese players, pointing out that direct shipping to Taiwan requires paying freight and import taxes, suggesting that using consolidated shipping can reduce the per-item cost, and using Buy & Ship as an example to explain the process of filling in Renaiss recipient information, suitable for users who are planning to pick up or ship card products.
rows.en\nBNS、星球、好運集運均提供美國倉包稅服務，運費約 170-175 元新: BNS, Planet, Good Luck Consolidation all provide US warehouse tax-included service, shipping cost about 170-175 New Taiwan Dollars per pound.
rows.en\nBNS 可多國合包但需經香港轉運，等待時間約 14~28 天: BNS can combine shipments from multiple countries but requires transit via Hong Kong, with a waiting time of about 14~28 days.
rows.en\n填寫集運地址時務必於收件人處標註自己的會員編號: When filling out the consolidated shipping address, be sure to mark your member ID on the recipient field.
rows.en\n功能進度 Renaiss 集運攻略：運費+稅金比較與寄送步驟，留意下一則: Feature progress: Renaiss consolidated shipping guide: shipping fee + tax comparison and shipping steps; stay tuned for the next official announcement.
rows.en\nRenaiss 社群海賊王卡牌對戰 Arena 開放報名: Renaiss community One Piece card battle Arena opens for registration
rows.en\nRenaiss 社群於 Discord 推出 OPTCG 實戰對戰活動「: Renaiss community on Discord launches OPTCG live battle event 'Arena Launch', inviting players to practice using OPTCG SIM; completing battle missions unlocks the 'Log Pose' SBT. Event runs from April 11 to 25, during which the Arena OPTCG channel will livestream battles. Suitable for new players who want to learn One Piece card competition; the community will later introduce more competitive tournaments.
rows.en\n4月11日至25日加入 Arena OPTCG 頻道，使用 OPTCG: From April 11 to 25, join the Arena OPTCG channel and use OPTCG SIM to complete battle missions.
rows.en\n對戰不計勝負，完成即可解鎖「記錄指針」SBT 領取資格: The battle does not affect win/loss; completing it will unlock the eligibility to claim the 'Record Pointer' SBT.
rows.en\n直播同步開啟，可觀戰並參與提問討論: Live streaming is now open; you can watch and participate in the Q&A discussion.
rows.en\n活動 Renaiss 社群海賊王卡牌對戰 Arena 開放報名，時間 4: The Renaiss community's One Piece card battle Arena is now open for registration, running from April 11 to April 23, 23:59 (UTC+8), with SBT as the main reward.
rows.en\n用戶分享 Renaiss 超夢卡交易與市場觀察: User shares Renaiss Ultra Dream Card trading and market observation
rows.en\n普通用戶 @ChenYichiao 分享在 Renaiss 平台購入超夢: A regular user @ChenYichiao shares their personal experience of purchasing an Ultra Dream Card on the Renaiss platform, noting that the card's current market price is about 380 USD, expressing hope that the platform will soon enable the physical card pickup feature, and revealing that the two cards previously picked up offline have already increased in value. The user advises players with bad luck to consider buying cards through the secondary market, while also providing a registration link. This is a personal market view, with no official events or feature update announcements.
rows.en\nRenaiss 超夢卡市價約 380 美元，為個人購入參考價: Renaiss Ultra Dream Card market price is about 380 USD, serving as a personal purchase reference price.
rows.en\n先前線下領取的實體卡已有增值，平台尚未公告新領取時間: The physical card previously received offline has already increased in value, and the platform has not yet announced the new collection time.
rows.en\n用戶推薦二級市場作為入手管道並提供註冊連結: The user recommends the secondary market as a purchase channel and provides a registration link.
rows.en\n活動 用戶分享 Renaiss 超夢卡交易與市場觀察，建議追蹤報名與地點: Event: Users share Renaiss Super Dream Card trades and market observations, recommending to follow the registration and location information.
rows.en\nRenaiss 2026年4月23日至26日 重要更新整合: Renaiss 2026 April 23 to 26 Important Update Integration
rows.en\n本週Renaiss平台迎來多項重大更新。產品方面，Legacy Pack: This week, the Renaiss platform ushered in several major updates. In terms of products, Legacy Pack 8.0 was released on the 24th at a price of $2850 and sold out within 22 minutes. Omega Pack restocked on the 26th at 3 PM and added more than ten S‑tier cards, with the top‑tier card valued at over one thousand dollars. The first five users have opened S‑cards and received limited‑edition commemorative SBTs. On the community side, the official held multiple offline events during the Hong Kong Web3 Festival from the 23rd to the 24th, including the BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and a two‑day TCG Explorer Tour covering card hubs such as Mong Kok Sino Centre and Cityplaza, with participation SBTs now available for claim. In terms of games, the Region Royale Asia Invitational was officially announced to launch simultaneously in Taiwan, South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore. SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 score thresholds have been updated: Bronze requires 180 points, Silver requires 1160 points, Gold.
rows.en\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月26日在其平台宣布OMEGA Pack: Renaiss officially announced on April 26, 2026 on its platform that the OMEGA Pack has been restocked, with five users being the first to open rare S‑cards, and the official simultaneously minted limited SBTs for eligible users, which symbolize early participants' special achievements and stimulate market attention for rare cards.
rows.en\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0於2026年4月26日公布新積分: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 announced new point thresholds on April 26, 2026: Bronze requires 180 points (Top 40 %), Silver requires 1160 points (Top 10 %), Gold requires 7100 points (Top 1 %). The SBT snapshot will be taken at 3:00 AM on the 27th via Discord and the official live stream, where users can check their ranking in real time and confirm eligibility.
rows.en\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月25日正式預告Region Royal: Renaiss officially previewed on April 25, 2026 that the Region Royale Asia Invitational will be held simultaneously in five regions—Taiwan, Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore—aiming to attract new users and strengthen community cohesion across regions, with the official already issuing calls to enthusiasts in each region.
rows.en\nOmega Pack於2026年4月26日下午3時（UTC+8）進行補貨: The Omega Pack restocking will occur on April 26, 2026 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8). More than ten S-level cards have been added this time, with top-tier cards valued at over $1,000. Players must draw at least once before the end of May to unlock the Omega Restock SBT qualification. This official move is considered a key measure to stimulate market liquidity.
rows.ko\n春季資訊刊｜2026 年春季 TCG 快訊：Omega Pack 再補、: 봄 정보지 | 2026년 봄 TCG 뉴스: Omega Pack 재보강, Legacy Pack 8.0 매진, Region Royale 아시아 초청전 곧 개막
rows.ko\n本週官方更新顯示，Omega Pack 補貨已於首批 S 卡問世，並同步: 이번 주 공식 업데이트에 따르면, Omega Pack 보충은 첫 번째 S 등급 카드가 출시됨에 따라 이루어졌으며, 동시에 기념 SBT도 발급되었습니다. 또한 4월 26일에 재보충되어 10장이 넘는 S 등급 카드가 추가되었습니다; Legacy Pack 8.0이 정식 출시된 후 22분 만에 매진되었으며, 이는 플레이어 수요의 증가를 반영합니다. SuperLiquid Beta 2.0의 Top 1% 컷오프가 7,100점으로 상향되었으며, 도전이 더욱 어려워졌습니다. 이와 동시에 Region Royale 아시아 초청전이 곧 개막되며, 원피스 카드 배틀 Arena의 참가 신청이 개시되었으며 마감 시간이 다가오고 있습니다.
rows.ko\nOmega Pack 補貨上架，首批 S 卡出爐且紀念 SBT 同步發放: Omega Pack 보충이 출시되었으며, 첫 번째 S 등급 카드가 나오고 기념 SBT가 동시에 발급되었으며, 10장이 넘는 S 등급 카드가 새로 추가되었습니다.
rows.ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 Top 1% 積分門檻升至 7: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 Top 1% 포인트 임계치가 7,100점으로 상승, Top 플레이어는 미리 준비해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRegion Royale 亞洲邀請賽即將開戰，海賊王卡牌對戰 Aren: Region Royale 아시아 초대전이 곧 시작되며, 해적왕 카드 전투 Arena 신청 마감일이 4월 30일로 연장되었으며, Legacy Pack 8.0 완판 열기가 지속되고 있습니다.
rows.ko\nOMEGA Pack 補貨上架首批S卡出爐並頒發紀念SBT: OMEGA Pack이 재입고되어 첫 번째 S 카드가 출시되었으며, 기념 SBT가 수여됩니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方宣布OMEGA Pack卡包已完成補貨，五位用戶率先開: Renaiss 공식은 OMEGA Pack 카드 팩의 보충이 완료되었으며, 다섯 명의 사용자가 최초로 S 카드 희귀 카드를 개봉했다고 발표했습니다. 이번 이정표를 기념하여, 공식은 자격 요건에 부합하는 사용자에게 한정된 SBT를 동시에 발행하여 초기 참여자의 특별한 성과를 상징합니다. 이 업데이트는 공식 제품 판매 동향으로, 전통적인 마케팅 활동이 아니며, 카드 팩 구매에 관심이 있거나 S 카드 희귀도에 주목하는 수집가를 대상으로 합니다. 후속 보충 및 SBT 수령 시기를 확인하려면 공식 계정을 팔로우하시기 바랍니다.
rows.ko\nOMEGA Pack卡包已重新上架，想入手的用戶可前往官方頁面購買: OMEGA Pack 카드 팩이 재입고되었으며, 구매를 원하시는 사용자는 공식 페이지에서 구매하실 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n首批5位幸運用戶已開出S卡，恭喜名單內用戶盡快查看自己的S卡: 첫 번째 5명의 행운의 사용자가 S 카드를 개봉했으며, 당첨 목록에 포함된 사용자는 가능한 한 빨리 자신의 S 카드를 확인해 주시기 바랍니다.
rows.ko\n限量SBT已開放領取，符合資格的收藏者可至指定連結完成claim: 한정판 SBT가 이미 수령 가능하며, 자격 있는 수집자는 지정된 링크로 이동하여 claim을 완료할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 積分門檻更新：Top 1% 需: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 포인트 임계값 업데이트: Top 1%은 7,100점에 도달해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方公布 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 新積: Renaiss 공식이 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0의 새로운 포인트 임계값을 발표했습니다. Bronze(Top 40%)는 180점, Silver(Top 10%)는 1,160점, Gold(Top 1%)는 7,100점입니다. 스냅샷까지 하루도 채 되지 않아, 경쟁 압력이 심화되면서 점수가 지속적으로 상승하고 있습니다. Beta SBT를 보유한 사용자는 자신의 포인트가 목표 임계값에 부합하는지 즉시 확인해야 하며, 다음 단계에서는 스냅샷 전에 포인트 추격을 완료해야 합니다.
rows.ko\n快照時間為 4 月 27 日凌晨 3:00（GMT+8），需在此之前確認: 스냅샷 시간은 4월 27일 새벽 3:00(GMT+8)이며, 이 시간 전에 포인트가 기준에 도달했는지 확인해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nGold 門檻需達 7,100 分，競爭激烈下分數仍在上升: Gold 임계값은 7,100점에 도달해야 하며, 경쟁이 치열한 상황에서 점수가 여전히 상승하고 있습니다.
rows.ko\n持有 Beta SBT 的用戶應即時查看排名儀表板追蹤自己的位置: Beta SBT를 보유한 사용자는 순위 대시보드를 실시간으로 확인하여 자신의 위치를 추적해야 합니다.
rows.ko\n海賊王卡牌對戰活動截止時間延長至4月30日: 원피스 카드 전투 이벤트 마감 기한이 4월 30일로 연장되었습니다.
rows.ko\n海賊王卡牌遊戲（OPTCG）對戰活動的紀錄指針領取期限從原訂時間延長至2: 원피스 카드 게임(OPTCG) 전투 이벤트의 기록 바늘 수령 기한이 원래 예정된 시간에서 2026년 4월 30일 저녁 23:59 (UTC+8)로 연장되어, 아직 수령하지 않은 플레이어에게 더 많은 참여 시간을 제공합니다. 개최측은 yyclub을 새로운 전투 플랫폼으로 추가하여 기존 OPTCGsim과 병행 지원합니다. 플레이어는 개최측에 직접 연락하여 전투를 잡아야 하며, 이는 이벤트 종료 전 마지막 참여 기회이며, 놓치면 기록 바늘 보상을 받을 수 없습니다.
rows.ko\n對戰截止時間為2026/04/30 23:59，逾期未完成將失去領取資格: 대결 마감 시간은 2026/04/30 23:59이며, 기한을 넘겨 완료하지 않으면 수령 자격이 사라집니다.
rows.ko\n現已支援OPTCGsim與yyclub兩平台，玩家可任選熟悉的方式參與: 이제 OPTCGsim와 yyclub 두 플랫폼을 지원하며, 플레이어는 자신이 익숙한 방식을 자유롭게 선택하여 참여할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n立即聯繫0x1001或另一位帳號安排對戰時間，避免錯過最後窗口: 즉시 0x1001 또는 다른 계정에게 연락하여 대결 시간을 정하고, 마지막 기회를 놓치지 마세요.
rows.ko\n活動 海賊王卡牌對戰活動截止時間延長至4月30日，時間 30、23:59: 이벤트 원피스 카드 배틀 마감 기한이 4월 30일로 연장되었습니다. 시간 30, 23:59, UTC+8, 미리 참여 준비를 권장합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 宣布 Region Royale 亞洲邀請賽即將開戰: Renaiss가 Region Royale 아시아 초대전을 곧 시작한다고 발표했습니다
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方正式預告 Region Royale 邀請賽將在韓國: Renaiss 공식이 Region Royale 초대 대회를 한국, 태국, 말레이시아, 싱가포르, 대만의 5개 지역에서 동시에 개최한다고 공식적으로 예고했다. 이번 대회는 성장과 커뮤니티 확장을 핵심으로 삼아 신규 사용자를 유치하고 각 지역 커뮤니티의 결속력을 강화하는 것을 목표로 한다. 공식은 보상을 준비했다고 밝히며, 각 지역 팬들에게 "Get your region ready"라고 외쳤고, 이는 각 지역에서 치열한 경쟁과 사용자 모집 활동이 전개될 것임을 시사한다. 참가에 관심이 있는 자는 후속 등록 또는 초대 메커니즘 등의 상세 정보를 지속적으로 확인해야 한다.
rows.ko\n持續關注 Renaiss 官方公告，等待五國區域賽的具體報名與參與方式: Renaiss 공식 발표를 지속적으로 확인하고, 5개국 지역 대회( five countries)의 구체적인 참가 신청 및 참여 방법을 기다려 주세요.
rows.ko\n聯繫當地社群或戰隊，了解是否有內部推薦或邀請名額: 현지 커뮤니티나 팀에 문의하여 내부 추천이나 초대 자리가 있는지 확인하세요.
rows.ko\n追蹤官方動態與社群討論，掌握獎勵內容與競賽規則詳情: 공식 동향과 커뮤니티 논의를 추적하여 보상 내용과 대회 규정 상세 정보를 파악하세요.
rows.ko\n功能進度 Renaiss 宣布 Region Royale 亞洲邀請賽即: 기능 진행: Renaiss이 Region Royale 아시아 초대전이 곧 시작된다고 발표했습니다. 다음 공식 발표를 확인해 주세요.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方與 Portaldot 聯合舉辦 Poker Nig: Renaiss 공식과 Portaldot이 공동으로 Poker Night 이벤트를 개최하며, 오늘 밤 8시에 정식 시작됩니다. 신청은 이미 열려 있습니다. 참가자들은 200 USDT 상금 풀을 나눌 기회를 얻으며, 상위 10명은 포켓몬 M3 팩을 독점 보상으로 받을 수 있습니다. 이 이벤트는 커뮤니티 상호작용 성격으로, 레저 게임과 카드 수집 보상을 결합하여, 블록체인 상호작용에 관심이 있는 플레이어와 수집가들이 실시간으로 신청 상황과 경기 진행 상황을 추적할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n今晚8點前完成報名，報名連結：https://t.co/SCqjRMQu: 오늘 저녁 8시 전에 등록을 완료해 주세요, 등록 링크: https://t.co/SCqjRMQunr
rows.ko\n前十名可獲得寶可夢 M3 卡包，非錢包獎勵需至 Community Ev: 상위 10명은 포켓몬 M3 카드 팩을 받을 수 있으며, 지갑이 아닌 보상은 Community Event에서 수령해야 합니다.
rows.ko\n總獎池包含200 USDT，由 Portaldot 提供，詳情可至活動頁: 총 상금 풀은 200 USDT이며, Portaldot이 제공합니다. 자세한 내용은 이벤트 페이지에서 확인하세요.
rows.ko\nOmega Pack 4月26日補貨 新增逾十張S級卡牌: Omega Pack 4월 26일 재입고, 10장 이상의 S급 카드 추가
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方宣布Omega Pack將於4月26日下午三時（UTC: Renaiss 공식적으로 Omega Pack이 4월 26일 오후 3시(UTC+8)에 재입고되어 돌아온다고 밝혔으며, 이번에 10장을 초과하는 S급 카드가 새로 추가되었으며, 그 중 최고 등급 카드의 가치는 $1,000를 초과합니다. 참여를 촉진하기 위해 공식적으로 다음과 같은 조건을 설정했습니다: 플레이어는 5월 말까지 최소 한 번 Omega Pack을 뽑아야 Omega Restock SBT 자격을 얻을 수 있습니다. 10 million 마일스톤이 가까워짐에 따라, 이번 재입고 조치는 시장 유동성을 자극하는 핵심 조치로 간주되고 있습니다.
rows.ko\nOmega Pack於4月26日下午3時（UTC+8）開放購買，詳情請關: Omega Pack이 4월 26일 오후 3시(UTC+8)에 구매가 열리며, 자세한 내용은 공식 사이트 공지를 확인해 주세요.
rows.ko\n新卡組包含逾十張S級卡牌，單張最高價值逾一千美元，建議關注二級市場走勢: 새로운 카드 세트에는 10장을 초과하는 S급 카드가 포함되어 있으며, 한 장의 최고 가치는 $1,000를 초과합니다, 이차 시장 동향을 주시할 것을 권장합니다.
rows.ko\n需在5月底前完成至少一次抽取才可領取Omega Restock SBT，: 5월 말 전에 최소 한 번 뽑아야 Omega Restock SBT를 받을 수 있으며, claim 마감 시간을 확인해 주세요.
rows.ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0 22分鐘完售感謝支持: Legacy Pack 8.0 22분 만에 완판되어 지원을 감사합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方宣布Legacy Pack 8.0上架後22分鐘內完售: Renaiss 공식은 Legacy Pack 8.0이 출시 후 22분 만에 완판되었다고 밝혔으며, 다시 한 번 빠른 완판 기록을 세웠습니다. 이 성과는 수집 시장에서 Renaiss 제품에 대한 지속적인 열정을 반영하며, 한정 전략의 매력이 유지되고 있음을 보여줍니다. 다음 단계에서는 후속 카드 팩의 출시 일정과 시장 가격 추이를 추적할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0 已全數完售，成交時間為上架後22分鐘: Legacy Pack 8.0이 완전히 판매 완료되었으며, 거래 시간은 출시 후 22분입니다.
rows.ko\n官方對社群支持表達感謝，並預告將有後續產品: 공식은 커뮤니티 지원에 감사를 표하며, 후속 제품이 있을 것이라고 예고했습니다.
rows.ko\n建議追蹤後續卡包公告與二級市場報價變化: 후속 카드 팩 공지 및 이차 시장 견적 변동을 추적할 것을 권장합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方宣布 Legacy Pack 第八版已開放鑄造與交易: Renaiss 공식은 Legacy Pack 제8판이 이미 생산 및 거래 가능해졌으며, 사용자는 즉시 플랫폼 인터페이스를 통해 새 팩을 수령하거나 구매할 수 있다고 발표했습니다. 이번 버전은 정기 업데이트이며, 제한된 이벤트가 아닙니다. 주로 기존 수집가와 팩 투자자에게 영향을 미칩니다. 후속으로는 공식에서 희귀도 분포나 특수 카드 정보 공개 여부를 확인하시기 바랍니다.
rows.ko\n打開 Renaiss 平台即可查看並交易 Legacy Pack 8.0: Renaiss 플랫폼을 열면 Legacy Pack 8.0을 확인하고 거래할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n關注官方公告了解新版本稀有卡分布與鑄造限制: 공식 공지를 확인하여 새 버전의 희귀 카드 분포와 생산 제한을 파악하세요.
rows.ko\n收藏者可評估是否將新卡包納入現有投資組合: 수집자는 새 카드 팩을 기존 투자 포트폴리오에 포함시킬지 평가할 수 있습니다
rows.ko\n功能進度 卡包與抽卡表現，時間節點 live now，留意開放條件。: 기능 진행 카드 팩 및 뽑기 성능, 시간 노드 live now, 개방 조건에 주의하세요.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方 這則屬於功能更新，核心為「Legacy Pack: Renaiss 공식 이것은 기능 업데이트에 해당하며, 핵심은 「Legacy Pack 카드 팩 출시 및 가격 구간 업데이트」입니다. 주요 시간 노드는 live now입니다. 사용자에게 직접적인 영향은: 이 업데이트는 이후 사용 흐름에 영향을 미치며, 공식의 다음 세부 정보를 추적해야 합니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 感謝參與香港 Web3 Festival 系列活動，CE: Renaiss는 홍콩 Web3 Festival 시리즈 활동에 참여해 주셔서 감사하며, CEO SBT가 수령 가능하다고 알립니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 在香港 Web3 Festival 期間參與多場活動，包: Renaiss는 홍콩 Web3 Festival 기간 동안 BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night 및 HK TCG Tour를 포함한 다양한 활동에 참여했습니다. 커뮤니티 멤버들의 적극적인 참여에 감사드립니다. 공식은 활동 참여 증명서인 SBT가 이미 수령 가능함을 공지했으며, 이는 이번 오프라인 시리즈 교류의 독점 기념물이자 미래 권리의 근거가 됩니다.
rows.ko\nBNB Chain Super Meetup、RWA Night、HK: BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, HK TCG Tour 3회의 활동 참여자는 지갑에서 SBT가 도착했는지 확인할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\nCEO SBT 領取方式為與 CEO 合影並張貼至指定推文串（https: CEO SBT 받기 방식은 CEO와 사진을 찍고 지정된 트윗 스레드에 올리는 것입니다 (https://t.co/UWDsI1uN28).

rows.ko\n黃大仙祠「God Pack」祝福環節為未拆封卡包進行傳統儀式，增添文化特: 황대선사 사당의 'God Pack' 축복 프로그램은 개봉하지 않은 카드 팩에 전통 의식을 진행하여 문화적 특성을 더합니다.

rows.ko\nRenaiss × Portaldot 線上撲克夜報名中，獎池含200: Renaiss × Portaldot 온라인 포커 나이트 신청 중, 상금 풀에 200 USDT와 M3 카드 팩 포함
rows.ko\nRenaiss與Portaldot聯合舉辦線上撲克競賽，定於4月24日晚: Renaiss와 Portaldot이 공동으로 개최하는 온라인 포커 대회가 4월 24일 저녁 7시 (UTC+8)에 lepoker.io 플랫폼에서 시작됩니다. 이번 행사에서는 참가자들 간에 나눠 갖는 200 USDT 상금 풀을 제공하며, 또한 Top 10 선수들에게 포켓몬 M3 카드 팩을 지급합니다. 동시에 Top 100 완주자 모두에게 Community Event SBT를 받을 수 있습니다. 플레이어는 공식 신청 링크를 통해 사전 등록할 수 있으며, 이번 행사는 커뮤니티 교류와 기술 교류의 결합으로, Web3와 카드 게임에 관심 있는 회원분들의 참여에 적합합니다.

rows.ko\nTop 100完賽者將獲得Renaiss社區活動SBT，可留意錢包領取資: Top 100 완주자는 Renaiss 커뮤니티 활동 SBT를 받을 수 있으며, 지갑에서 수령 자격을 확인해 주세요.

rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方釋出「SBT 快照門檻更新」活動資訊。時間為 3:0: Renaiss 공식이 'SBT 스냅샷 임계값 업데이트' 이벤트 정보를 공개했습니다. 시간은 3:00 AM、3:00입니다. 장소는 온라인(Discord / Live)입니다. 주요 인센티브는 SBT、포인트입니다. SBT 획득 방식: 스냅샷 시 상위 40%：170점、상위 10%：930점、상위 1%：4900점, 스냅샷 시간 27 Apr, 3:00 AM. 이러한 유형의 이벤트는 명확한 인센티브가 있어 일반적으로 참여율과 커뮤니티 확산을 높입니다.

rows.ko\nRenaiss 正式啟用 MFA 多因素驗證功能，透過 Privy 登入: Renaiss은(는) MFA 다단계 인증 기능을 정식 활성화하여, Privy 로그인을 통해 접속하는 사용자는 인증 앱을 연동하여 6자리 인증 코드를 생성할 수 있으며, 계정 탈취 위험을 줄여줍니다. 이번 업데이트는 모든 Privy 로그인 사용자에게 적용되므로, 즉시 설정 페이지에서 MFA를 활성화하여 추가 보안 보호를 받을 것을 권장합니다.
rows.ko\n透過 Privy 登入的用戶可至設定頁面啟用 MFA: Privy 로그인을 통해 접속하는 사용자는 설정 페이지에서 MFA를 활성화할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n綁定驗證器 app 後產生 6 位數驗證碼保護帳戶: 인증 앱을 연동한 후 6자리 인증 코드를 생성하여 계정을 보호합니다

rows.ko\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 階段性結束，SBT 資格門檻出: Superliquid Beta 2.0 단계가 종료되고 SBT 자격 기준이 공개되었습니다
rows.ko\nRenaiss 官方公告 Superliquid Beta 2.0 即將: Renaiss 공식 발표: Superliquid Beta 2.0이 곧 종료되며, 모든 참가자의 점수는 다음 단계에서 초기화될 예정입니다. Beta 2.0 순위는 받을 수 있는 SBT 등급을 결정하며, Elite(상위 40%), Prime(상위 10%), Apex(상위 1%) 세 가지로 나뉩니다. 해당 SBT를 보유한 사용자는 새로운 기능을 먼저 체험할 수 있는 권한을 얻게 되며, 모든 참가자는 현재 순위 진행 상황과 자격 상태를 확인하는 것이 좋습니다.
rows.ko\n確認目前 Beta 2.0 積分排名是否達到 Elite SBT 的前百: 현재 Beta 2.0 점수 순위가 Elite SBT의 상위 40% 기준에 도달했는지 확인하세요.
rows.ko\n下一階段積分將重置，欲衝 Prime（前百分之十）或 Apex（前百分之: 다음 단계에서 점수가 초기화될 예정이므로, Prime(상위 10%) 또는 Apex(상위 1%)에 도달하려면 다시 전략을 세워야 합니다.
rows.ko\n持有 Elite、Prime 或 Apex 等級 SBT 可搶先體驗新功: Elite, Prime 또는 Apex 등급 SBT를 소지하면 신기능을 먼저 체험할 수 있으며, 후속 수령 공지를 확인하는 것이 좋습니다.
rows.ko\n香港TCG Tour 現場直播：神秘大方玩家請全團開盒: 홍콩 TCG Tour 라이브 중계: 신비롭고 관대한 플레이어가 전팀에게 상자를 열게 해주세요.
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方帳號在直播中發布香港TCG Tour現場實況，一位名為: Renaiss 공식 계정이 라이브 중 홍콩 TCG Tour 현장 실황을 공개했으며, @Plus_Ultra_715라는 참여자가 큰돈을 써서 비용을 부담한 뒤, 현장을 통해 전 팀원들에게 One Piece, Pokémon, Digimon 등 여러 카드가드 게임의 박스 제품을 개봉하게 했습니다. 모두 연달아 좋은 카드를 꺼내며 분위기가 즐거웠습니다. 이 사건은 커뮤니티 오프라인 모임의 결속력과 무작위 서프라이즈 감각을 보여주며, 관객들이 현장의 뜨거운 분위기를 느끼도록 이끌었습니다. 이후 진행 측에서 더 많은 Tour 단편이나 다음 행선지를 공개할지 주목할 필요가 있습니다
rows.ko\n直播中@Plus_Ultra_715請全團開One Piece/寶可夢/: 라이브 중 @Plus_Ultra_715이 전 팀원에게 One Piece/Pokémon/Digimon 등 여러 카드가드 게임의 박스를 개봉하게 했습니다.
rows.ko\n現場接連開出好卡，官方帳號已置頂該則直播文: 현장에서 연속으로 좋은 카드가 나오고, 공식 계정이 해당 라이브 방송 글을 상단에 고정했다.
rows.ko\n香港為Tour首站，後續行程與下一站資訊可追蹤官方公告: 홍콩이 Tour의 첫 번째 정류장이며, 후속 일정과 다음 정류장 정보는 공식 발표를 통해 확인할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\nGate與Red Bull聯手舉辦「Racing the Future」: Gate와 Red Bull이 함께 「Racing the Future」 전시회를 개최합니다.
rows.ko\nGate攜手Red Bull於2026年4月18日至24日在香港K11: Gate가 2026년 4월 18일부터 24일까지 홍콩 K11 MUSEA에서 「Racing the Future」 전시를 개최하여 Gate 창립 13주년을 축하합니다. 현장에서는 Red Bull Racing 및 F1 테마 설치와 한정판 콜라보 선물 등을 전시하며, 관객은 레이싱 쇼를 가까이서 감상할 수 있습니다. 참가 희망자는 Luma 플랫폼을 통해 사전 예약을 해야 하며, VIP 또는 파트너 티켓 신청 시 소속 회사 란에 'Renaiss'를 기재합니다. 이 행사는 Web3 Festival 기간 중의 오프라인 전시로, 블록체인 업계 종사자, 레이싱 팬 및 투자자들 간 교류에 적합합니다.
rows.ko\n地點在香港尖沙咀K11 MUSEA，採免費入場但需預約: 장소는 홍콩 침사추이 K11 MUSEA이며, 무료 입장이 가능하나 예약을 해야 합니다.
rows.ko\n申請VIP票須填寫「Renaiss」，報名連結為luma.com/bb5: VIP 티켓을 신청하려면 'Renaiss'를 기입해야 하며, 신청 링크는 luma.com/bb5l9oa4입니다.
rows.ko\nCommunity Rip Pack Event：One Piece 卡: Community Rip Pack Event：One Piece 카드 개봉 라이브 대결
rows.ko\nDiscord 頻道 @0x1001 宣布舉辦 Community Ri: Discord 채널 @0x1001이 Community Rip Pack Event를 개최한다고 밝혔으며, 5명의 참가자는 4월 16일 저녁 9시 (UTC+8)에 Discord 라이브 방송에서 One Piece 카드 게임 개봉 대결을 펼칠 것입니다. 각 참가자는 3박스(총 72팩)를 열어 희귀도를 겨루게 됩니다. 모든 투표에 참여하고 인터랙션한 관중은 Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT를 받을 수 있으며, 투표 참여자들은 공식이 제공하는 OP-15 팩을 받을 기회도 있습니다. 이 이벤트는 원피스 카드 애호가들에게 시청과 인터랙션을 동시에 즐길 수 있는 참여 경험을 제공하며, 커뮤니티에 합류하고 SBT 수집을 시도해 보고 싶은 플레이어에게 적합합니다.
rows.ko\n4月16日晚間9點（UTC+8）加入 Discord 直播觀看開包對決，: 4월 16일 저녁 9시 (UTC+8)에 Discord 생방송에 참여하여 개봉 대결을 시청하고, 투표로 1~3위 수상자를 예측하세요.
rows.ko\n投票者可獲得 Community Rip Pack Event Surv: 투표자는 Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT를 받을 수 있으며, OP-15 카드 팩을 다시 뽑을 기회가 있습니다.
rows.ko\n追蹤 @0x1001 頻道以接收活動報名表與直播通知: 팔로우 @0x1001 채널을 통해 활동 참가 신청서와 생방송 알림을 받으세요.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 集運攻略：運費+稅金比較與寄送步驟: Renaiss 집화 배송 가이드: 운임+세금 비교 및 발송 절차
rows.ko\n社群成員整理三大集運方案供台灣玩家參考，指出直送台灣需負擔運費與進口稅金: 커뮤니티 회원들이 3가지 주요 집화 방안을 대만 플레이어를 위해 제공하여 참고하도록 하며, 직접 대만으로 배송하려면 운임과 수입 세금을 부담해야 한다고 지적한다. 집화를 통해 단일 품목 비용을 절감할 수 있다고 제안하며, Buy & Ship을 예로 Renaiss 수령 정보 입력 절차를 설명한다. 이는 카드 수령이나 카드 게임 상품 발송을 계획 중인 사용자에게 적합하다.
rows.ko\nBNS 可多國合包但需經香港轉運，等待時間約 14~28 天: BNS는 여러 국가 합포가 가능하지만, 홍콩 경유 전량이 필요하며, 대기 시간은 약 14~28일입니다.
rows.ko\n填寫集運地址時務必於收件人處標註自己的會員編號: 집하 주소 작성 시 반드시 수취인란에 자신의 회원 번호를 기입해야 합니다.
rows.ko\n功能進度 Renaiss 集運攻略：運費+稅金比較與寄送步驟，留意下一則: 기능 진행 Renaiss 집화 가이드：운임+세금 비교와 발송 절차，다음 공식 공지를 확인하세요.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 社群海賊王卡牌對戰 Arena 開放報名: Renaiss 커뮤니티 원피스 카드 배틀 Arena 오픈 등록
rows.ko\nRenaiss 社群於 Discord 推出 OPTCG 實戰對戰活動「: Renaiss 커뮤니티는 Discord에서 OPTCG 실전 대결 활동 'Arena 출항'을 출시하여, 플레이어들이 OPTCG SIM을 사용하여 실전 연습을 하고, 대결 미션을 완료하면 '기록 포인터' SBT를 획득할 수 있습니다. 활동 기간은 4월 11일부터 25일까지이며, 해당 기간 동안 Arena OPTCG 채널에서 대결을 실시간 중계합니다. 원피스 카드 게임의 경쟁을 배우고 싶은 초보 플레이어에게 적합하며, 커뮤니티는 향후 더 많은 경쟁 대회도 개최할 예정입니다.
rows.ko\n4月11日至25日加入 Arena OPTCG 頻道，使用 OPTCG: 4월 11일부터 25일까지 Arena OPTCG 채널에 합류하여 OPTCG SIM으로 대결 미션을 완수하세요.
rows.ko\n對戰不計勝負，完成即可解鎖「記錄指針」SBT 領取資格: 대결은 승패를 가리지 않으며, 완료하면 '기록 포인터' SBT를 받을 수 있는 자격이 주어집니다.
rows.ko\n直播同步開啟，可觀戰並參與提問討論: 라이브 스트리밍 동기화가 시작되어, 관전과 질문 및 토론에 참여할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\n活動 Renaiss 社群海賊王卡牌對戰 Arena 開放報名，時間 4: 이벤트 Renaiss 커뮤니티 원피스 카드 배틀 Arena 참가 신청이 열렸습니다, 시간 4월 11일 ~ 4월 23일 23:59, UTC+8, 주요 보상 SBT.
rows.ko\n用戶分享 Renaiss 超夢卡交易與市場觀察: 사용자가 공유한 Renaiss 초몽카드 거래 및 시장 관찰.
rows.ko\n普通用戶 @ChenYichiao 分享在 Renaiss 平台購入超夢: 일반 사용자 @ChenYichiao가 Renaiss 플랫폼에서 초몽 카드를 구매한 개인 경험을 공유하며, 해당 카드의 현재 시장 가격은 약 380 달러라며, 플랫폼이 빠른 시일 내에 실물 카드 수령 기능을 개방하기를 희망한다고 밝혔습니다. 또한 오프라인으로 수령한 두 장의 카드가 이미 상승세를 보이고 있다고 밝혔습니다. 운이 없는 플레이어에게는 2차 시장 경로를 통한 카드 구매를 고려해 볼 것을 제안하며, 함께 등록 링크를 첨부했습니다. 이는 개인적인 시장 관점이며, 공식 행사나 기능 업데이트 공지가 아닙니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss 超夢卡市價約 380 美元，為個人購入參考價: Renaiss 초몽 카드 시장 가격은 약 380 달러로, 개인 구매 참고 가격입니다.
rows.ko\n先前線下領取的實體卡已有增值，平台尚未公告新領取時間: 이전에 오프라인으로 수령한 실물 카드가 이미 가치 상승을 이루었으며, 플랫폼은 아직 새로운 수령 일정을 공지하지 않았습니다.
rows.ko\n用戶推薦二級市場作為入手管道並提供註冊連結: 사용자가 세컨더리 마켓을 구입 경로로 추천하며 등록 링크를 제공합니다.
rows.ko\n活動 用戶分享 Renaiss 超夢卡交易與市場觀察，建議追蹤報名與地點: 이벤트 – 사용자가 Renaiss 초몽카드 거래와 시장 관찰을 공유하고, 등록 및 장소 정보를 추적할 것을 권장합니다.
rows.ko\n本週Renaiss平台迎來多項重大更新。產品方面，Legacy Pack: 이번 주 Renaiss 플랫폼은 다수의 주요 업데이트를 맞이했습니다. 제품 측면에서 Legacy Pack 8.0은 24일에 2,850달러에 출시되어 22분 만에 완판되었으며, Omega Pack은 26일 오후 3시에 재입고되어 10장 이상의 S급 카드를 새로 추가했으며, 그 중 최상위 카드의 가치는 1,000달러를 초과합니다. 첫 번째 다섯 명의 사용자가 S 카드를 뽑아 한정판 기념 SBT를 받았습니다. 커뮤니티 측면에서, 공식은 23~24일 홍콩 Web3 Festival 기간 중 다수의 오프라인 활동을 개최했으며, BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night 및 이틀간 진행되는 TCG 탐험 투어를 포함하며, 원츄 신화센터, 은성광장 등 카드 허브를 덮었습니다. 관련 참여 SBT는 이미 수령 가능합니다. 게임 측면에서 Region Royale 아시아 초대전은 공식적으로 대만, 한국, 태국, 말레이시아, 싱가포르에서 동시에 펼쳐질 것을 예고했으며, SuperLiquid Beta 2.0의 점수 기준은 Bronze는 180점, Silver는 1,160점, Gol
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月26日在其平台宣布OMEGA Pack: Renaiss 공식은 2026년 4월 26일 플랫폼에서 OMEGA Pack의 재입고가 완료되었음을 발표했으며, 다섯 명의 사용자가 먼저 S 카드 희귀 카드를 뽑았습니다. 공식은 동시에 자격 있는 사용자들에게 한정판 SBT를 발행했으며, 이는 초기 참가자의 특별한 업적을 상징하며 희귀 카드에 대한 시장의 관심을 자극했습니다.
rows.ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0於2026年4月26日公布新積分: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0은 2026년 4월 26일에 새로운 포인트 임계값을 발표했으며, Bronze는 180점(Top 40%), Silver는 1160점(Top 10%), Gold는 7100점(Top 1%)을 달성해야 합니다. SBT 스냅샷은 27일 새벽 3시에 Discord 및 공식 라이브 방송에서 진행되며, 사용자는 그때 자신의 순위를 실시간으로 조회하고 자격을 확인할 수 있습니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月25日正式預告Region Royal: Renaiss 공식은 2026년 4월 25일에 Region Royale 아시아 초대전이 대만, 한국, 태국, 말레이시아, 싱가포르 5개 지역에서 동시에 개최될 것이라고 공식적으로 예고했으며, 새로운 사용자를 유치하고 각 지역의 커뮤니티 응집력을 강화하는 것이 목표입니다. 공식측은 이미 각 지역의 팬들에게 참여호를 보냈습니다.
rows.ko\nOmega Pack於2026年4月26日下午3時（UTC+8）進行補貨: Omega Pack은 2026년 4월 26일 오후 3시(UTC+8)에 재입고되었으며, 이번에 10장 이상의 S급 카드가 새로 추가되었고, 최고 등급 카드의 가치는 $1,000를 넘습니다. 플레이어는 5월 말까지 최소 한 번 뽑아야 Omega Restock SBT 자격을 잠금 해제할 수 있으며, 공식의 이 조치는 시장 유동성을 자극하는 핵심적인 조치로 여겨지고 있습니다.

rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].raw_text\:
Very happy to see @gate_ventures mention renaiss, let's discuss in detail just how painful the traditional Pokémon TCG secondary market is?✨
- Counterfeit goods are rampant, hard to distinguish with the naked eye, the chance of buying a fake even with a genuine card is not low
- Slow transactions: meeting in person or using platform consignment settlement takes 7-14 days
- Fees + shipping + arbitration fees exceed 13%
- Poor liquidity, often stuck in hand when you want to sell
- The most annoying thing is counterfeits; I bought a PSA10 at a high price https://t.co/4FoIx2HOiY

🎤 Renaiss Plaza Reminder — See you tonight 🕘 April 17, 21:00 (UTC+8) 📍 Renaiss Discord
This time Renaiss will share:
• Project data update
• SBT 2.0, points and merchandise
• Community growth incentive activities
• Event sponsorship system
• One Piece gacha machine
This time we will also invite a special guest: Ricky —— a well-known One Piece TCG collector, to chat with him:
• https://t.co/hNka6Yh1kv

rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].raw_text\: Show translation The recent good news is that we are preparing to open card collection soon, however direct shipping to Taiwan with shipping cost + tax is likely a point of concern for everyone, so let me introduce another method, which is consolidated shipping. The prices shared below are all for the US warehouse with tax included per pound! Three consolidated shipping services I've used: 1. buy and ship: price: tax-included 170NTD per pound. Pros: large company, reasonable price, calculated per pound, can ship to multiple countries. Cons: because it can be consolidated from multiple countries for shipping back, it will first go to Hong Kong, then to Taiwan, requiring a wait of 14~28 days. 2. Star Consolidated Shipping: price: tax-included 170NTD per pound. Pros: fast speed, like BNS, can consolidate shipping from many countries. Cons: if under 20 pounds, an additional 150NTD home delivery fee applies. 3. Good Luck Consolidated Shipping: price: tax-included 175NTD per pound. Pros: fast speed, discount for shipments over 10 pounds. Cons: currently only has Mainland China and US warehouses, and if shipping only 1 pound, the shipping fee is 300. Usage (using BNS as example): After registration, go to the member center, click the overseas warehouse address, you will see the address in the picture below. Fill in this recipient and address in Renaiss, note that you must fill in your own ID number! Generally, the usage for each service is the same, I'm sure you can extrapolate! That's basically it. If you have any other questions, feel free to ask me, I will answer when I have time, hope this helps. Also, if you haven't joined Renaiss yet, feel free to use my referral code~ · 6 3 20 5 Read 6 replies

rows.en\ndigest.headline\nfa77a420b88e3bac: Spring TCG News Flash | Omega Booster Restocking Return, Region Royale Cross-Region Preview, Legacy Pack 8.0 Officially Launched
rows.en\ndigest.conclusion\n072f3d9532b64387: This season the official continues to update the popular booster packs and the Soulbound Token (SBT) mechanism. The Omega booster has been re-listed and the SBT unlock conditions have been adjusted, while the cross-region battles of Region Royale and the arrival of Legacy Pack 8.0 are previewed. On the community side, a wave of Mewtwo card investment, as well as One Piece card livestream openings and competitive events, have emerged, giving players both investment and competitive opportunities.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[0]\nfcfe77d889cbb53: Omega booster restocks on 4/26, with over 10 new S-Tier cards available for purchase, and the SBT unlock conditions are updated accordingly.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[1]\n1ebe985d117bd5f: Region Royale: Invite Battle officially announced; five Asian regions will face off in cross-region matches, marking a new milestone in regional competition.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[2]\nf109676875af46b: Legacy Pack 8.0 version launched, accompanied by One Piece card livestream openings and competitive tournaments, offering multiple channels for both investment and competition.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].title\n5d: Omega booster re-listed; SBT unlock conditions updated.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].summary\n: Renaiss official announcement: the Omega booster pack has been restocked, adding new S‑Tier cards, with some top‑tier cards valued over $1000. The official also set a threshold: players must complete at least one draw before May to unlock the Omega Restock SBT. This update directly impacts players who hold Alpha passes or are interested in high‑value cards; they should follow the subsequent card draws and market quotes.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[0: The Omega booster pack has been re‑listed and added S‑Tier cards, with some top‑tier cards' market quotes exceeding $1000.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[1: One draw must be completed before the end of May to unlock the Omega Restock SBT; after the deadline it cannot be claimed.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[2: It is recommended to track opening results and secondary market quotes to assess whether it is a good time to purchase.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: OPTCG Pirate Battle event deadline extended to 4/30; new yyclub participation platform added.

The official has extended the originally scheduled Record Pointer claim deadline to 2026/04/30 23:59 (UTC+8), giving pirates who have not yet claimed the final chance to participate, and added the community-developed yyclub platform to support battles. Players need to actively contact the announcer to arrange battles; this is a community battle event that offers SBT rewards and is part of the official Alpha phase testing.
The battle deadline is 4/30 23:59 (UTC+8), and participation will not be possible after that.
A new yyclub platform (original OPTCGsim continues to be supported) can be used to schedule battles.
Contact 0x1001 or the designated ID to arrange a battle to complete SBT reward collection.
The OPTCG Pirate Battle event deadline has been extended to 4/30, with a new yyclub participation platform. The time is 4/30 23:59 (UTC+8). It is recommended to arrange participation in advance.
rows.en\ncards[2047990492592537885].title\n9b: Region Royale: Invite Battle preview arrives, five major Asian regions are about to battle.
rows.en\ncards[2047990492592537885].summary\n: Renaiss officially announces that it will host "Region Royale: Invite Battle", with participating regions covering South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, and Taiwan. The event aims to promote local community growth and expand new users, and has announced exclusive rewards. Players from the five regions should keep an eye on the official follow‑up announcements and await details on registration and participation methods.

rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].title\n24: Renaiss × Portaldot Poker Night starts at 8 PM tonight, with a 200 USDT prize pool + Pokémon M3 booster pack rewards.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].summary\n: Renaiss CN partners with Portaldot to host a Poker Night event, registration closes at 8 PM tonight, with a prize pool of 200 USDT and Pokemon M3 card packs (top 10). This is the first community event in the Renaiss ecosystem jointly organized with an external project, targeting poker enthusiasts and SBT holders; participants can register via the official registration link, and the next step is to watch the live stream results tonight.

rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].title\n08: Omega Pack restocking on 4/26, over 10 S-Tier new cards available for purchase.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].summary\n: Renaiss officially announces that the Omega Pack will be restocked on April 26 at 3 PM (UTC+8), with more than 10 new S-Tier cards added, including top-tier cards whose market value exceeds $1,000. To celebrate the upcoming 10M milestone, the team has also released the Omega Restock SBT; any player who completes an Omega Pack draw before May can unlock this badge. This update is valuable for collectors and secondary market investors; it is recommended to pay attention to the restocked card lineup and market price changes.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].bullets[0: Omega Pack restock on 4/26 at 15:00 UTC+8, adding 10+ S-Tier cards.

rows.en\ncards[2047571243256426777].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that Legacy Pack 8.0 is now available for players, with the pack opening feature restored. This version continues the existing Legacy series mechanics, offering players a new round of card pack draws. For collectors who continuously monitor the RWA card pack developments, the launch of version 8.0 signifies the series' ongoing iteration; there is no need to focus on specific timing, just wait for the official's subsequent announcements regarding new content or Special Box Tickets information.
rows.en\ncards[2047571243256426777].bullets[0: Legacy Pack 8.0 is now open; the version number and launch status can be confirmed on the official page.

rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].title\n07: Renaiss thanks Hong Kong Web3 Festival participants and announces the CEO SBT claim method.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].summary\n: Renaiss thanks the community for participating after the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, covering events such as BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and HK TCG Tour, and announces the CEO SBT claim method: users need to take a photo with the CEO and post it to the community as proof of participation. This SBT can serve as a record of event participation; it is recommended to stay tuned for any future plans regarding the distribution of other rare SBTs.

rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].summary\n: Renaiss organized a two‑day TCG pilgrimage during the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, guiding the community through Wong Tai Sin Temple, Mong Kok malls, and local card shops, combining a blessing ceremony with a physical card‑opening experience. The CEO treated participants on the spot to purchase Pokémon and One Piece booster boxes, allowing attendees to truly feel the density and vibrancy of Hong Kong’s TCG market. The event also celebrated Renaiss’s vision of tokenizing physical collectibles, hoping to connect more players and expand liquidity and participation. This kind of community experience that blends travel, culture, and collecting helps deepen the connection between Web2 and Web3 collectors.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[0: Follow Renaiss’s official account to stay updated on announcements and registration schedules for the next city pilgrimage.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[1: Join the community Discord or Telegram group to get exclusive event invite codes and limited SBT notifications first.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[2: If you want to replicate a similar model, you can study combinations of culturally symbolic locations such as Hong Kong card shops and Wong Tai Sin Temple.

rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].title\nbf: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT threshold and snapshot time announcement
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced the SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT qualification score thresholds, divided into Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers: Top 40% requires 170 points, Top 10% requires 930 points, Top 1% requires 4900 points. Officials stress these are floating reference values and thresholds may rise as participation increases. The snapshot is scheduled for April 27 at 03:00 UTC; wallet interactions will affect score rankings. Users should note that thresholds are not final; ongoing interaction can improve qualification chances.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[0: Three SBT tier thresholds: Bronze 170 points, Silver 930 points, Gold 4900 points, calculated based on score ranking intervals.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[1: Snapshot time is April 27 at 03:00 UTC; at that time thresholds may be adjusted due to changes in participant numbers.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[2: Keep an eye on the official page for real-time threshold updates: https://t.co/WGyruWucCD
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].title\na1: Renaiss launches MFA authentication feature to enhance account security
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].summary\n: Renaiss officially announces that the MFA multi-factor authentication feature is now live. All users logging in via Privy can enable MFA on the settings page, binding a 6-digit verification code generated by an authenticator app to add an extra layer of protection to their accounts. This feature is designed to reduce the risk of account theft. Players on the All in Renaiss platform should prioritize completing MFA setup to secure their assets, and can later watch for any official announcements on whether it will be further enforced.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[1: Use an authenticator app to generate a 6‑digit verification code to complete identity verification
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[2: It is recommended that all players set up MFA immediately to protect their accounts and assets
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].title\n4c: Superliquid Beta 2.0 enters the settlement phase, with SBT qualifications granted in three tiers based on ranking
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].summary\n: Superliquid Beta 2.0 test phase is ending soon. The official announcement indicates that points will be reset for the next round, and participants' rankings will determine the SBT tier they can receive, split into Elite (top 40%), Prime (top 10%), and Apex (top 1%) thresholds. The notice aims to remind holders to watch their wallet balances and point changes, and to ensure that their wallet has completed the points snapshot to confirm eligibility for claiming.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[0: The Beta 2.0 phase missions have concluded; points will be reset to facilitate the next round's calculation
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[1: SBT claim eligibility is divided into three tiers—Elite, Prime, Apex—based on ranking top 40%/10%/1%
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[2: Holders must confirm that their wallet has completed the snapshot and stay tuned for subsequent announcements regarding claim timing and claim methods
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].title\n3e: Pokémon secondary market pain points analysis × Renaiss evening sharing session preview
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].summary\n: @davidcheang99, from the perspective of a traditional Pokémon card secondary market practitioner, enumerates four major structural problems: difficulty distinguishing fakes (even high‑priced PSA10 cards are often purchased as counterfeits), transaction times lasting 7 to 14 days, total fees exceeding 13%, and insufficient liquidity for cash‑out. He also re‑posted gate_ventures' discussion mentioning Renaiss. The reminder is that tonight at 21:00 (UTC+8) the Renaiss Discord gathering will have the project team explain data, SBT 2.0 and the points system, and invite One Piece TCG collector Ricky to discuss the card market, making it suitable for players interested in on‑chain physical‑collectible solutions to follow.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[0: The traditional Pokémon secondary market has a high rate of counterfeit cards; it is recommended to verify third‑party grading labels such as PSA/BGS before trading.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[1: Tonight at 21:00 UTC+8, join the SBT 2.0 briefing on Renaiss Discord; you can ask Ricky for advice on physical card collecting experience.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[2: Follow Renaiss for the upcoming reveal of the One Piece card draw machine and the progress of the activity sponsorship system implementation.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].glance\n9: Event: Pokémon secondary market pain point analysis × Renaiss evening sharing session preview. Date: April 17, 21:00 UTC+8. Key rewards: SBT, points, and merchandise.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Gate x Red Bull co‑branded exhibition lands at Hong Kong K11 MUSEA for a week.

Gate exchange and Red Bull Racing are collaborating to host the 'Racing the Future' exhibition, running from April 18 to 24 at K11 MUSEA in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. The venue will feature F1 racing‑themed installations, the Gate 13th anniversary milestone wall, and offer co‑branded gifts. When registering, fill in 'Renaiss' in the company field to apply for VIP or partner tickets, suitable for participants interested in Web3 and racing culture.
Location: K11 MUSEA in Hong Kong. Opening hours: 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily.
Registration link is a Luma form; fill in 'Renaiss' in the company field to apply for a VIP ticket.
On‑site there will be a Red Bull F1 car display and the Gate 13‑year milestone wall.
Event: Gate x Red Bull co‑branded exhibition at Hong Kong K11 MUSEA for a week, hours 10:00 AM–10:00 PM, Apr 18; it is advised to plan ahead.
One Piece card live‑stream pack opening battle starts on 4/16; participate in voting to get SBT and OP‑15 packs.

The One Piece Card Game will hold a live "Community Rip Pack Event" opening battle on Discord at 9:00 PM (UTC+8) on April 16. The event gathers 5 participants, each using 3 boxes of card packs (72 packs in total) to compete in luck of pulling rare cards. Viewers who join the stream and vote to predict the final top three will receive the "Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT", and voters also have a chance to win an OP-15 card pack provided by the official as a prize. This is a combined activity of community interaction prediction and live rip opening; card enthusiasts and SBT collectors should pay attention to registration and streaming times.
Join the voting at the Discord live stream at 9 PM on 4/16; predict the final top three to have a chance to win an OP-15 card pack.
Those who watch the entire livestream and complete the interactions can receive the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT through the form that opens during the event period.
The event is limited to 5 participants, 72 packs will be opened one by one during the livestream, and the format is a rarity showdown.

rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss Pirate King Card Tournament is now live, complete battles to earn SBT

Renaiss community opens One Piece card (OPTCG) live battle event on Discord, inviting players to join the exclusive channel from April 11 to April 25 to complete a non‑ranked battle, which unlocks the limited "Log Pose" SBT claim eligibility. The event also offers live streaming viewing, suitable for players who want to learn physical card competitive play or collect limited SBTs. The officials stated that more community competitive events will be launched later, worth paying continuous attention.
Join the Discord OPTCG channel and read the tutorial pinned post, then complete a real battle with the battle assistant.
No need to calculate wins or losses in battle; after completing, you will obtain the eligibility to claim the 'Record Pointer' SBT.
The event registration deadline is April 25 at 23:59 UTC+8; we recommend completing it early to avoid missing out.
One Piece Card Live Unboxing Event Debuts on 4/9 Evening

Community members purchase the One Piece card original box at their own expense, plan to open the cards in a Twitter live stream, and will give half of the opened boxes (a total of 6 boxes of the 08 supplement) to fans in an interactive way. Participants can be drawn in the live stream to receive 2 packs of cards. Winners of high-value cards (SP, SEC, Big Head) can choose to receive the cards by courier (only available in mainland China, shipping costs to be paid by the recipient), and can also receive a Renaiss MVP badge. The event is scheduled for April 9th at 8 PM, and professional players on site will explain the basic rules of OPCG.
Watch the live stream on Twitter at 8 PM on 4/9, with a chance to be randomly selected to receive 2 One Piece 08 Booster Packs.
High-value cards (SP, SEC, Big Head) winners can choose to receive the cards by courier, with shipping fees paid by themselves, limited to Mainland China only.
Winners will also receive a Renaiss MVP badge, and professional players will explain OCPG basics on site.
One Piece TCG

One Piece Card Opening Night! The long-awaited One Piece card opening event is here! To thank the community for its continuous support, I personally bought a whole box of One Piece cards, and now I'm giving away half of the box, 6 packs, via live stream to our friends. Event time: April 9th at 20:00. Prize: 6 packs of One Piece 08 expansion pack. Event format: The opening will be streamed on Twitter. While opening packs, lucky users will be continuously selected from the live chat, and each lucky user will receive two packs. If they open a high-value card (please forgive my small personal preference, except for manga Rayleigh), the user can choose to receive the cards by courier, with shipping at their own expense, limited to Mainland China only. Additionally, friends who draw a high-value card will also receive the Renaiss MVP badge. High-value cards include SP, SEC, and Big Head. There will also be our professional card experts <@1008983683740487760> <@947713275922120724> on site to explain the basics of OPCG (One Piece Card Game).
Activity: community livestream and interaction, time April 9, recommended to arrange participation in advance.

rows.en\nofficial_overview.summary\n1a09a20e4: This week, Renaiss has consecutively released the Omega supplement pack restock and SBT unlock conditions, previewed the five major Asian Region Royale invite tournaments, completed the offline Hong Kong Web3 Festival event, announced the SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 point thresholds and snapshot time, launched Legacy Pack 8.0, and introduced MFA multi-factor authentication, comprehensively covering product updates, community activities, qualification certifications, and account security.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[0]\n9411dc: Alpha Pass holders and players interested in high-value cards must complete one Omega supplement pack draw between the April 26, 2026 restock and before May in order to unlock the Omega Restock SBT; this restock adds over 10 S‑Tier cards, with top-tier cards priced over $1,000, which will directly boost players' collection enthusiasm and market trading volume.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[1]\n1bf571: Players in Taiwan, Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore, please note that Renaiss announced on April 25, 2026 that it will hold the "Region Royale: Invite Battle" to promote local community growth and new user registration; specific registration and participation details will be revealed by the official later, and participants can receive exclusive rewards and expand local player interactions.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[2]\nab8941: Participants in SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 need to complete the point snapshot at 3:00 AM (UTC) on April 27, 2026; depending on ranking, they can reach the Bronze (top 40% requires 170 points), Silver (top 10% requires 930 points), or Gold (top 1% requires 4,900 points) tier thresholds, after which they can claim the corresponding SBT, influencing players' point strategies and wallet asset tagging.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[3]\ndafa78: All Renaiss users, especially collectors and those who value account security, can start using Legacy Pack 8.0 from April 24, 2026 to participate in the new card pack draws, and can enable MFA multi-factor authentication by binding a authenticator app via Privy login, further reducing the risk of account theft and enhancing overall platform security.

rows.ko\ncards[2044381540067803312].raw_text\: Show translation 최근의 좋은 소식은 카드를 받을 준비를 해야 한다는 것입니다. 그러나 대만으로 직접 배송 시 운임 + 세금이 모두에게 관심 사항일 것입니다. 그래서 다른 방법인 통합운송을 소개하겠습니다. 아래 공유하는 가격은 미국 창고 포함 세금 1파운드 가격입니다! 제가 사용한 통합운송 3곳: 1. buy and ship: 가격: 포함 세금 170NTD 장점: 대형 업체, 합리적인 가격, 1파운드씩 계산, 여러 국가로 배송 가능 단점: 여러 국가로 통합 배송이 가능하기 때문에 또는 먼저 홍콩에 도착한 후 대만으로 다시 보내야 하므로 14~28일이 소요됩니다. 2. 별집 통합운송: 가격: 포함 세금 170NTD 장점: 속도가 빠르며, BNS처럼 많은 국가에서 통합운송 가능 단점: 20파운드 미만일 경우 150NTD의 배송비가 추가됩니다. 3. 행운 통합운송: 가격: 포함 세금 175NTD 장점: 속도가 빠르며, 1회 출하 시 10파운드 이상이면 할인 적용 단점: 현재 중국 및 미국 창고만 제공하고, 1파운드만 배송 시 운임이 300입니다. 사용 방법 (BNS 예시): 가입 후 회원 센터에 들어가서 해외 창고 주소를 클릭하면 아래 사진에 있는 주소가 보입니다. 해당 수취인과 주소를 Renaiss에 입력하면 됩니다. 반드시 자신의 번호를 입력해야 합니다! 기본적으로 각 회사의 사용 방법은 동일하니, 나머지도 비슷하게 적용할 수 있을 것입니다. 대략적으로 이것으로 충분합니다. 추가 질문이 있으면 편하게 물어보세요. 제가 시간이 날 때마다 답변드리겠습니다. 도움이 되셨길 바랍니다. 또한 아직 Renaiss에 가입하지 않은 분도 제 초대 코드를 사용하실 수 있습니다~ · 6 3 20 5 Read 6 replies

@0x1001 이 활동의 핵심은 「⏰ **활동 시간**；4월 11일 - 4일、23:59、UTC+8」이며, 시간은 4월 11일 - 4일、23:59、UTC+8, 장소는 온라인（Discord / 라이브）이며, 주요 인센티브는 SBT, 참여 방식은 Discord、라이브 스트리밍이다. 이러한 활동은 명확한 인센티브가 있어 일반적으로 참여율과 커뮤니티 확산을 높인다.
주요 활동: ⏰ **활동 시간**; 4월 11일 - 4월 25일 23
시간과 장소: 4월 11일 - 4、23:59、UTC+8／온라인（Discord / Live）
보상 중점: SBT
SBT 획득 방법: SBT 대결 임무를 완료하면 전용 **「기록 포인터」SBT** 받기 자격을 잠금 해제할 수 있습니다...
참여 방법: Discord, 라이브 스트리밍
영향: 이런 활동은 명확한 유인이 있어, 보통 참여율과 커뮤니티 확산을 높입니다.

rows.ko\ncards[2040786743721644522].raw_text\: 오늘도 @renaissxyz에서 뮤트 카드를 한 장 얻었어요. 현재 약 380u 정도 올랐어요. 빨리 실물 카드를 받을 수 있기를 바랍니다. 이전에 오프라인으로 받은 두 장도 폭등했어요. 운이 좋지 않다면 2차 시장에서 기회를 찾아보세요! 아직 가입하지 않은 분도 아래 링크를 클릭해 등록하세요 https://t.co/sgCstfLCWQ https://t.co/299CEnE1UW
rows.ko\ncards[2040786743721644522].detail_su: @chenyichiao 이번 활동의 주제는 "오늘 또 초몽 카드를 하나 얻었는데 현재 약 380u 정도까지 올랐습니다; 빨리 실물 카드를 받을 수 있기를 바랍니다. 이전에 오프라인으로 받은 두 장도 가격이 급등했습니다", 참여 방식은 원문 공지를 기준으로 합니다. 이 알림은 참여 정보를 알리기 위한 것이며, 핵심은 시간, 장소 및 참여 방법입니다.
rows.ko\ncards[2040786743721644522].detail_li: 활동 주제: 오늘 다시 뮤 한 장을 얻었으며 현재 약 380u까지 올랐다; 빨리 실물 카드를 받을 수 있기를 바라며, 이전에 오프라인으로 받은 두 장 모두 급등했다.
시간 및 장소: 공식 확정 대기 중.
보상 주요 사항: 원문 보상 설명을 기준으로 해주십시오.
참여 방식: 먼저 참가 방법, 마감 시간 및 정원 확인.
영향: 이 공지는 참여 정보를 알리기 위한 것으로, 핵심은 시간, 장소 및 참여 방식입니다.
추가 맥락: 아직 가입하지 않은 분들도 아래 링크를 클릭하여 가입할 수 있습니다.

rows.en\ndigest.headline\n187d5e4b4e344d62: Spring TCG News | Omega Pack Restock and Limited-Time Return, Region Royale Asia Five-Region Registration Open, Legacy Pack 8.0 Sold Out Quickly
rows.en\ndigest.conclusion\n40c47e2b5aa9722b: This week's official update focuses on the restock and limited-time return of popular card packs, while simultaneously opening Region Royale Asia Five-Region competition registration, showing that the community's dual demand for physical cards and online battles continues to rise. Legacy Pack 8.0 sold out in a short period, also indicating that the new series will spark a new wave of collecting fervor; more live stream box openings and Arena battle events will be launched in the future, and players should keep a close eye on these developments.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[0]\n3dcf46d50df8cdd: Omega Pack restocking adds S‑Tier cards and simultaneously launches a limited-time return, accompanied by limited SBT unlock conditions, spurring collector market activity.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[1]\nbde102d334f231c: Region Royale: Invite Battle Asia Five-Region participation registration is now hotly open, offering rich rewards and opportunities for physical card exchanges.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[2]\nd203e6740580f86: Legacy Pack 8.0 went live at 3:00 PM (UTC+8) and sold out in just 22 minutes, showing players' high anticipation for the new series; more live box openings and community Arena battles will follow.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].title\na9: Omega Pack restock announcement: S-Tier cards added.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that Omega Pack has been restocked and relisted, with new S‑Tier level cards added. These cards have a reference price exceeding $1,000. This update also includes conditions for the SBT Pull event, requiring users to complete a draw before May to unlock related privileges. This announcement is significant for collectors and investors; it is advised to monitor subsequent card price changes.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[0: Omega Pack has been relisted, adding S-Tier cards with a reference price over $1,000.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[1: The SBT Pull event continues; users must complete a draw before May to unlock SBT.
rows.en\ncards[2048306797380047146].bullets[2: It is recommended to continue monitoring card secondary market prices and official follow-up announcements.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: The Pirate Battle event deadline has been extended to 4/30, with official support on the yyclub platform.

Official announcement extends the Pirate Battle activity claim record deadline to April 30, 2026 at 23:59, and adds yyclub platform support for battles. Players who have not yet completed the challenge have a tight deadline and need to contact the organizers immediately to arrange the final battle opportunity.
Deadline extended to 4/30 23:59 UTC+8; any overdue submissions will not be able to claim the record pointer.
yyclub new platform has been supported; official battle certification can be performed on this platform.
Contact 0x1001 or another organizer to schedule a battle, ensuring the challenge is completed before the deadline.

rows.en\ncards[2047990492592537885].title\n28: Region Royale: Invite Battle Asia five-region participation registration is open.
rows.en\ncards[2047990492592537885].summary\n: Renaiss officially announces that Region Royale: Invite Battle will be held in five Asian regions, covering Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Taiwan. This event focuses on local community growth and new user expansion; participants will represent their respective regions for honor. The officials have prepared rewards but have not yet disclosed the details; interested communities should keep following subsequent announcements for participation details.

rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].title\n55: Renaiss × Portaldot Joint Poker Night starts tonight; champion can win a Pokémon M3 booster pack.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].summary\n: Renaiss CN and PortaldotL0 will hold a joint poker competition tonight at 8 PM, with a total prize pool of 200 USDT; the top 10 players can receive a Pokémon M3 booster pack. This event is a cross‑industry collaboration between the SBT project and a Web3 gaming platform, combining physical Pokémon cards with cryptocurrency rewards, and is ideal for players interested in joining blockchain gaming community activities to sign up now.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[0: Join the registration page at 8 PM tonight; the prize pool is 200 USDT.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[1: Top 10 players can receive a Pokémon M3 booster pack.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[2: Organized by Renaiss CN and PortaldotL0.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].title\na3: Omega Pack Limited-Time Return with Limited SBT Unlock Conditions
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].summary\n: Renaiss announces that the Omega Pack will return for a limited time on April 26 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), featuring over 10 S-rank cards, with the top cards valued at over $1,000. Users only need to complete one Omega Pack draw before May to unlock the eligibility for the 「Omega Restock SBT」 reward. The platform also hints it is approaching the 10 million user milestone. This update primarily impacts card collectors and traders, so it is advised to take advantage of the return timing to ensure SBT qualification.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].bullets[0: Omega Pack returns on 4/26 at 15:00 UTC+8, offering 10+ S-rank cards.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].bullets[1: Complete one Omega Pack draw before May to unlock the limited SBT reward.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].bullets[2: Platform approaches the 10 million user milestone; stay tuned for upcoming milestone event announcements.
rows.en\ncards[2047586034050077039].title\n45: Legacy Pack 8.0 sold out in 22 minutes.
rows.en\ncards[2047586034050077039].summary\n: Renaiss officially announces that Legacy Pack 8.0 sold out quickly within 22 minutes after launch, reflecting high market demand for the series. This is another record-breaking sales speed after the previous version, showing that players' enthusiasm for TCG collectibles remains strong. It is recommended to follow future version plans and possible restock information.

rows.en\ncards[2047586034050077039].bullets[1: This marks another quick sell-out record for the series, indicating stable demand.
