rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].title\n83: Legacy Pack 8.0 Opening Draw Announcement: High-value cards up to $2,850
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].summary\n: Renaiss announces that Legacy Pack 8.0 will be open for drawing on April 24 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), with a total of 1000 packs released, each priced at $100, and each pack can be worth up to $2850. This is a limited event, so fans need to prepare their accounts and funds in advance to participate.
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].bullets[0: The draw starts on time at 3:00 PM (UTC+8) on April 24. Please log in early to verify your wallet balance.
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].bullets[1: Limited to 1000 packs, $100 each; recommended to set an alarm to be aware of the draw opening time to avoid missing out.
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].bullets[2: The highest value per pack reaches $2850. See the official popular card list to reassess your investment strategy.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].title\n00: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT Threshold Points Update Announcement
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced the SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT point thresholds for claiming, divided into three tiers: Top 40% requires 170 points, Top 10% requires 930 points, Top 1% requires 4900 points. The officials emphasized that these values are dynamic reference thresholds, which will adjust floatingly as the number of participating users increases, and are not final fixed standards. The snapshot is scheduled for April 27 at 3:00 AM, at which time the current point snapshot will determine whether users meet the eligibility for claiming; interested test users need to continuously monitor changes in the point rankings.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[0: Top 1% points threshold is 4900 points. Eligible participants can claim SBT priority.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[1: The snapshot will be taken at 3:00 AM on April 27, at which time points will be locked for calculation.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[2: The threshold is a dynamic reference value, and the official reminder is that the point ranking may continue to rise.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].title\n1b: Renaiss Launches MFA Two-Factor Authentication Feature
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that the MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) feature is officially live. Users who log in via Privy can enable the 6-digit verification code provided by Google Authenticator or other authenticator apps on the settings page, greatly enhancing account security. The account protection upgrade directly affects all platform users, and it is recommended to enable it as soon as possible to prevent unauthorized login attempts.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[0: Go to the account settings page, enable MFA, and complete the authenticator app binding.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[1: After binding, each login will require entering the 6-digit verification code generated by the authenticator.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[2: If MFA is not enabled, the risk of account compromise will remain relatively high.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].title\n54: Superliquid Beta 2.0 will reset points and distribute three SBTs based on ranking.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].summary\n: Superliquid Beta 2.0 stage is about to end, and points will be reset in the next round. The ranking in this stage will directly determine the SBT tier that participants can claim: the top 40% can receive the Elite SBT, the top 10% can receive the Prime SBT, and the top 1% can receive the highest tier, the Apex SBT. Wallets holding Beta points should keep an eye on the point reset timing and verify whether their ranking in this round meets the threshold for the target tier.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[0: Log in to check your Beta 2.0 points and ranking, and confirm whether you have reached the target SBT tier threshold.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[1: Pay attention to the point reset timing; in the next round you will need to accumulate again to aim for a higher ranking.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[2: The three SBTs correspond to different ranking thresholds: Elite (top 40%), Prime (top 10%), Apex (top 1%).
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].title\n0c: Renaiss Plaza will discuss secondary market pain points tonight, featuring a conversation with a ONE PIECE collector.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].summary\n: Gate Ventures' Renaiss team will hold a Plaza talk on Discord on April 17 at 9:00 (UTC+8), revealing project data updates, SBT 2.0 and the points system, and also inviting the well-known ONE PIECE TCG collector Ricky to discuss practical experience in the card secondary market. Community members can participate in the live Q&A to learn about the official event sponsorship system and the upcoming ONE PIECE card draw feature.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[0: Join the Renaiss Discord at 21:00 UTC+8 tonight to participate in the Plaza talk; the Q&A portal is now open.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[1: The seminar will explain the SBT 2.0 point rules and the redemption thresholds for community growth incentive activities.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[2: ONE PIECE TCG collector Ricky will share his experience in physical card investment and anti-counterfeit identification.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Gate x Red Bull 'Racing the Future' exhibition arrives in Hong Kong.

The 'Racing the Future' exhibition, a collaboration between Gate and Red Bull, will be held at Hong Kong's K11 MUSEA from April 18 to 24, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily. As an offline event during the Web3 Festival, the exhibition features Red Bull Racing and F1 themed installations, the Gate 13th anniversary milestone wall, car displays, and co‑branded merchandise. The event offers limited spots; participants can register via the Luma page, and the company/project field in the registration form must be filled with 'Renaiss' to apply for VIP or partner tickets.
The exhibition will be held at Hong Kong's K11 MUSEA from April 18 to 24, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily.
Register through the Luma page; filling 'Renaiss' in the company field allows you to apply for VIP or Partner tickets.
The event is part of the Gate 13th anniversary celebration during the Web3 Festival, featuring Red Bull Racing themed installations on site.
One Piece card rip battle and community prediction event.

Five participants will each open three boxes of One Piece cards in a Discord livestream, totaling 72 packs for a rarity showdown. Viewers vote to predict the final top three winners. All participants who interact can claim a Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT, and voters who correctly predict can have a chance to receive an official OP‑15 pack. This event combines opening‑pack competition and community interaction, aiming to boost player retention and Discord community activity.
Join the Discord livestream at 9 PM on April 16 to watch the opening battle and participate in interactions.
During the livestream, a voting channel will open to predict who can make it to the final top three.
Participate in interactions or vote to receive a Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT.

rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss One Piece Card Battle Arena Opens, Real Battle Unlocks Record Pointer SBT

Renaiss Community Battle Arena One Piece Card Battle Event has officially launched; participants need to join the specified Discord channel to view the pinned tutorial, use OPTCG SIM to complete a live battle with an admin (result does not affect win/loss). Completing the battle mission unlocks eligibility to claim the "Log Pose" SBT. The event runs for two weeks until April 25, with live battles and spectator discussions available on-site. This is the community's first One Piece card battle experience, suitable for players who want to learn physical card battles; more tournaments will be opened later.
Join the Discord channel to read the tutorial, use OPTCG SIM and complete a live battle with the administrator to unlock the SBT claim eligibility.
The event runs until April 25 at 23:59, and the live stream will simultaneously be open for viewing and Q&A discussion.
The first "Record Pointer" SBT serves as a community competition honor record, and more events will be launched in the future.
Community Competition
One Piece card live unboxing event: 6 boxes of 08 expansion packs given away for free.

@0xFEI announced on Discord that on April 9 at 8:00 PM they will hold a "One Piece Card Opening Night" event via Twitter live stream. After purchasing an entire case of One Piece card original boxes, they will take out 6 boxes of 08 expansion packs from it for on‑site card opening and give them to the audience. During the card opening, lucky viewers will be drawn in real time from the live chat, and each lucky viewer can open 2 packs. If a high‑value card (SP, SEC, Big Head, except for the manga's Rayleigh) is drawn, the winner can choose to have it shipped at their own expense, limited to mainland China. Those who draw a rare card will also receive a Renaiss MVP badge, and professional card players will be invited as commentators at the live stream to explain basic OPCG knowledge.
April 9 at 20:00 Twitter live card opening, with lucky viewers drawn from the chat to receive 6 boxes of 08 expansion packs.
Winners of high‑value cards (SP/SEC/Big Head) can have them shipped at their own expense, limited to mainland China.
Rare card winners receive a Renaiss MVP badge, and OPCG professional players are present at the venue to explain the basic rules.

rows.en\ncards[2040786743721644522].title\n32: Community members share observations on Mewtwo card collection and market trends.
rows.en\ncards[2040786743721644522].summary\n: A collector received a Mewtwo Pokémon card on the Renaiss platform. The card has appreciated to about $380 on the secondary market. The user revealed that the two cards they previously obtained offline also increased significantly in value, suggesting that collectors with less luck could consider entering through the secondary market and promoting a registration link. This share reflects the hotness of the Pokémon physical card secondary market and serves as a reference for collectors planning to enter.
rows.en\ncards[2040786743721644522].bullets[0: The Mew card is quoted at around $380 in the secondary market, a significant increase compared to the minting or claiming cost.
rows.en\ncards[2040786743721644522].bullets[1: There is strong demand for physical card acquisition, and users with a card issuance record have already seen significant asset appreciation.
rows.en\ncards[2040786743721644522].bullets[2: For players who have not yet obtained a physical card, they can track the supply and demand as well as price trends in the secondary market.

rows.en\nofficial_overview.title\n12a711b3175: Recent major updates on the Renaiss platform: card system, event promotion, and security features.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.summary\n521b1a35b: The Renaiss platform will receive several important updates in late April 2026, primarily including three core contents: Omega Pack adds more than 10 high-value S-level cards and launches a limited restock event; Legacy Pack version 8.0 is officially launched with limited draws open; Superliquid Beta 2.0 point thresholds and distribution rules are established. At the same time, the platform will host the Region Royale esports event in five Asian countries and introduce MFA two-factor authentication to enhance account security.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[0]\nf10036: Omega Pack restocks on April 26, 2026 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), adding more than 10 S-level cards with a market value exceeding $1,000. Players who hold the Omega Restock SBT must complete one draw before the end of May to unlock the corresponding rewards, and it is expected to attract a large influx of collectors and investors.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[1]\nef5563: Legacy Pack 8.0 version launched on April 24, 2026 at 3 PM (UTC+8), with a limited release of 1,000 packs priced at $100 each, and the highest value per pack can reach $2,850, primarily affecting all users participating in the Alpha test and the collectibles market.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[3]\n9bb154: Renaiss officials participated in a series of events at the Hong Kong Web3 Festival in April 2026 (BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, HK TCG Tour), and promoted the Event SBTs reward series; also announced that Region Royale: Invite Battle will be held in Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, and Taiwan, focusing on user growth and community in the Asian market.
rows.en\ndigest.conclusion\nc2a616a4ca29f6ae: Official updates, recent activities, upcoming openings, and community highlights have been compiled from high-signal posts, so you won't be overwhelmed by scattered replies.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[0]\nb8205a3d1b0935d: First, check the official updates to confirm the product and activity direction.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[1]\n9f8605600c8b0d4: Recent activities are presented with time and participation details to reduce missing out.
rows.en\ndigest.takeaways[2]\n7450f9238896846: Community focus only retains posts with message density, no longer posting everything.

rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].title\n70: Renaiss thanks Web3 Festival Hong Kong participants and releases the SBT claiming method for the event.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].summary\n: Renaiss participated in multiple events during Web3 Festival Hong Kong, including BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and HK TCG Tour, and thanked participants after the events. The official also opened the claiming path for the event SBT, where the "Catch the CEO SBT" can be obtained by taking a photo with the CEO and publicly posting the photo to the specified link. Users who hold this SBT are considered proof of genuine participation in the official event.

rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].title\nd4: Renaiss Hong Kong TCG Tour Concludes Successfully
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].summary\n: Renaiss organized a two‑day TCG Tour in Hong Kong during the Web3 Festival, leading the community to visit Mong Kok Square, China Hong Kong City and other card shops and collection hotspots, and held a "Divine Pack" blessing ceremony at Wong Tai Sin Temple. CEO Winchman performed on‑site unboxings and presented Pokémon, One Piece, etc. card boxes, fostering interaction among physical card enthusiasts. The event aims to bridge on‑chain collectibles with physical TCG culture, injecting new traffic and participation methods into the Hong Kong collector market.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[0: Renaiss has completed an on-site visit in Hong Kong, and the next step will be to evaluate whether to replicate this model in other cities.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[1: The 'Divine Pack' blessing at Wong Tai Sin Temple is an original highlight; we can follow up on whether commemorative NFTs or SBTs will be released.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[2: The card boxes gifted on-site by the CEO have reached core players in the physical card community; the impact on Renaiss user growth needs to be observed.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].glance\na: Event: Card store tour and exchange activity; it is recommended to follow the registration and location details.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss and Portaldot are collaborating to hold an online poker event on April 24 at 7:00 PM; registration is now open. The prize pool includes 200 USDT and Pokémon M3 card packs (top ten), plus a Community Event SBT (top 100) as a participation incentive. Players interested in blockchain games and card rewards should complete registration and become familiar with the platform before the deadline.
Click the link to register: https://app.lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy; registration deadline is April 24 at 19:00.
The top ten players can receive Pokémon M3 card packs, and the total prize pool of 200 USDT will be shared among participants.
The event provides a Community Event SBT, which will be distributed to players ranked 1-100.
Card Pack Event
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].title\n05: Legacy Pack 8.0 is limited for sale, 1000 packs at $100 per pack.
rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that Legacy Pack 8.0 will be available for purchase on April 24 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), with a limited supply of 1000 packs priced at $100 each. According to official data, the highest single card value can reach $2850. This information comes from an official account and is highly credible. Targeted at collectors and investors interested in purchasing card packs, it is recommended to pay close attention to the sale start time and ensure sufficient wallet balance.

rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].bullets[2: Posted by the official account, click the original link to view full information and purchase details.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].title\n90: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT threshold announcement released; snapshot time revealed.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].summary\n: Renaissxyz official announcement: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT point thresholds, set in three tiers: Top 40% needs 170 points, Top 10% needs 930 points, Top 1% needs 4,900 points. Officials stress these thresholds are floating reference values, subject to continuous adjustment as participant numbers increase. Snapshot is scheduled for April 27 at 3:00 AM, eligibility based on snapshot result. This announcement concerns Beta participants' SBT claim eligibility; meeting the threshold will affect future rights. Please relevant users confirm their points gap to the target thresholds as soon as possible.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[0: Snapshot time: April 27 at 3:00 AM (UTC) as the cutoff calculation; at that time confirm whether you meet the threshold.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[1: Thresholds are not fixed: Top 40% requires 170 points, Top 10% requires 930 points, Top 1% requires 4,900 points, dynamically adjusted based on user participation.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[2: Follow the official follow-up announcements to confirm the SBT claim process and specific schedule.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].title\n2d: Renaiss officially launches MFA multi-factor authentication.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].summary\n: Renaiss official announces that multi-factor authentication (MFA) is now officially enabled. Users logging in via Privy can now enable a six-digit verification code on the account settings page; after binding an authenticator app, an additional security layer is added to the account. This feature aims to reduce unauthorized access risk; all accounts using Privy authentication are affected. Users are advised to promptly go to settings to complete activation to improve account security level.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[0: Go to the account settings page to enable MFA, bind an authenticator app to generate a six-digit verification code.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[1: All Renaiss accounts logging in via Privy now support MFA security verification.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[2: It is recommended to enable MFA as early as possible to avoid the risk of unauthorized account access.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].title\n6e: Superliquid Beta 2.0 will reset points, with the top 40%/10%/1% eligible to claim different SBT tiers.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].summary\n: Superliquid officially announces that the Beta 2.0 testing phase will end, and points will be reset in the new round. Players' rankings in the current phase will determine the SBT tier they can claim: top 40% get Elite SBT, top 10% get Prime SBT, top 1% get Apex SBT. Holding an SBT grants identity recognition beyond points, though specific use cases have not yet been fully disclosed.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[0: Beta 2.0 points will be completely reset after this round ends, and the next round will start from zero.
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[1: SBT can be claimed based on ranking: Elite (top 40%) / Prime (top 10%) / Apex (top 1%).
rows.en\ncards[2046560299466346710].bullets[2: Holding a Superliquid SBT provides identity identification that goes beyond points.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].title\n37: Observations of structural pain points in the traditional Pokémon card secondary market.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].summary\n: Veteran players reveal three major pain points in the physical card market: counterfeit items that are hard to identify with the naked eye leading to high risk, high fees and long settlement cycles that hinder liquidity, and even high-graded cards such as PSA10 can still be fakes. The article previews that the Renaiss Plaza event will be held tonight, where SBT 2.0 and project data updates will be announced, and One Piece TCG collector Ricky will be invited for an in-depth discussion. Players interested in blockchain card projects are advised to follow the event for the latest developments.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[0: Physical cards have high unit prices but come with counterfeit risk and a 7-14 day settlement period; it is advisable to understand the transaction protection mechanism before purchasing.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[1: Renaiss Plaza will take place tonight at 21:00 UTC+8 on Discord, where project data and SBT 2.0 progress will be released.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[2: Special guest Ricky is a One Piece TCG collector; his perspectives on physical cards and blockchain integration are worth following.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].glance\n1: Activity: Observation of structural pain points in the traditional Pokémon card secondary market; time: April 17, 21:00, UTC+8; key rewards: SBT, points, and peripherals.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Gate and Red Bull jointly host the "Racing the Future" exhibition

Gate exchange and Red Bull collaborate to hold the "Racing the Future" exhibition at Hong Kong's K11 MUSEA, showcasing Red Bull Racing Formula 1 related devices, Gate's 13th anniversary milestone wall and a real car display. Registration is open from today; applicants for VIP or partner tickets need to fill in "Renaiss" as the company or project name. This event runs concurrently with Web3 Festival week, representing a cross‑industry collaboration between blockchain and traditional racing, suitable for those interested in Web3 applications and brand events.
The exhibition runs from April 18 to 24, 2026, open 12 hours each day.
Location: K11 MUSEA in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong; reservations can be made via the Luma page.
When registering for VIP tickets, filling in "Renaiss" in the company field grants special eligibility.
Community Rip Pack Event | One Piece Card Opening Battle & Community Prediction

The community will host a One Piece card opening battle livestream on Discord at 9:00 PM on April 16. Five participants will each open 3 packs (total 72 packs) to compete in rarity, and viewers can watch the stream, vote to predict the final top three, and interact. All viewers will receive a Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT, and voters have a chance to win an officially sponsored OP-15 pack. This event is organized by the community, combining the thrill of opening cards with prediction fun, and is suitable for players interested in the One Piece Card Game who are willing to interact.
At 9:00 PM on April 16 (UTC+8), join the Discord livestream to watch the card opening battle.
Vote to predict the final top three winners; participants can obtain the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT.
Participants have the chance to receive the officially sponsored OP-15 card pack; registration details will be opened during the event.
Event: One Piece card updates, time: April 16th, 9 PM (9 PM), with SBT as the main reward.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].title\n40: Renaiss consolidation shipping card pickup plan: price comparison and usage tutorial for three consolidation services.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].summary\n: Community members share how to save on high shipping and tax costs for direct delivery to Taiwan when picking up cards from the Renaiss platform, using consolidation services. The article compares the price differences and pros/cons of three tax‑included consolidation services, and explains the steps for filling in the consolidation warehouse address on Renaiss. Target audience is Taiwanese users already joined or considering joining Renaiss; recommend comparing each consolidation service's minimum weight limit and waiting time before choosing.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[0: Both buy and ship and Star Planet consolidation are tax‑included at 170 NTD per pound; BNS requires 14–28 days.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[1: Good Fortune consolidation is tax‑included at 175 NTD per pound, with a discount for over 10 pounds, but only offers US‑China two warehouses.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[2: When filling in the consolidation address on Renaiss, be sure to include the member ID to ensure the package is correctly shipped.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].glance\n1: Feature Progress: Renaiss consolidation shipping card pickup plan – price and usage tutorial for three consolidation services; stay tuned for the next official announcement.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss community One Piece card arena is now open for registration.

Renaiss community announces the official opening of the One Piece card arena; the event runs from April 11 to 25. Participants need to join the Discord channel and complete live battle missions to receive the "Log Pose" SBT. This is the community's first OPTCG competitive reward, suitable for players who want to experience physical card battles.
Join the Discord channel and read the pinned tutorial.
Complete a real battle against a specified player using OPTCG SIM
Complete the task before April 25 to unlock SBT claim eligibility.
The Renaiss community One Piece Card Game arena opens for registration, running from April 11 to April 23 at 23:59 UTC+8, with SBT as the main prize.
One Piece OPCG Pack-Opening Night live event opens on April 9 at 8 PM.

Community member @0xFEI announced on Discord that they self-funded the purchase of a sealed One Piece card box, and will open packs live on Twitter on April 9 at 8 PM to give back to the community. The event offers 6 boxes of One Piece 08 booster packs as prizes; lucky viewers will be continuously drawn from the live chat, each able to open two packs. Lucky winners who pull high-value cards (SP, SEC, Big Head) can choose to receive the cards by courier (shipping at their own expense, limited to Mainland China addresses), and will also receive a Renaiss MVP badge. A professional card player will explain OPCG basics on site, providing a rare opportunity for One Piece card enthusiasts to observe and participate.
On April 9 at 8 PM, go to Twitter to watch the live stream, interact in the chat to participate in the raffle, and have a chance to win 2 packs of cards.
If you pull high-value cards (SP/SEC/Big Head), you can opt for courier delivery; shipping fees are at your own expense, limited to Mainland China addresses.
At the event, professional players <@1008983683740487760> <@947713275922120724> will explain OPCG basics.

rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: OPTCG community battle registration deadline extended to 4/30, with yyclub platform opened concurrently.

The One Piece card game battle event, organized by community player 0x1001, had its original deadline extended to April 30, 2026, due to insufficient participants. The organizers added the yyclub platform as a battle option, expanding participation convenience. This adjustment gives players who have not yet signed up more time to prepare, and interested participants must proactively contact the organizers to confirm details.
Battle deadline updated to 2026/04/30 23:59; players who have not yet claimed the Record Pointer, please seize the final opportunity.
New yyclub platform added (previously only supported OPTCGsim); you can directly inquire with the organizers about registration.
Contact: register via Discord DM to 0x1001 or the designated player <@873442739881115658>.
Registration postponed.

rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].title\n4c: Renaiss × Portaldot Poker Night starts at 8 PM tonight, with a prize pool of 200 USDT
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].summary\n: Renaiss CN and Portaldot L0 jointly host a poker night event, with registration opening tonight at 8 PM. The champion prize pool is 200 USDT, and the top 10 players can additionally receive a Pokémon M3 booster pack. This event is a regular interaction format of the Renaiss community, where players can join through the official registration link to win cryptocurrency and physical card rewards. Interested TCGRWA players should complete registration before the event starts.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[0: Complete your registration by clicking the sign-up link before 8 PM tonight, and join the Renaiss×Portaldot joint poker night.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[1: The top ten players can receive Pokémon M3 card packs, and the champion also gets a share of the 200 USDT prize pool.
rows.en\ncards[2047620731115065582].bullets[2: Click the Community Event link to view the full event description and reward rules.

rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].title\n47: Omega Pack Limited Return: 4/26 New Cards Added to Inventory and Unlock Exclusive SBT
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that the Omega Pack will make a limited return on April 26 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), with more than 10 new S-tier cards expected, among which popular cards are valued at over 1,000 USD. The team also released the 'Omega Restock SBT' badge, which players can unlock by completing at least one Omega Pack draw before May. In addition, the team teased that they are about to reach the 10 million transaction milestone, and advises players to keep an eye on further announcements.
rows.en\ncards[2047616545090859207].bullets[0: Omega Pack returns at 4/26 at 3:00 PM (UTC+8), new card pool contains 10+ S-rank cards

rows.en\ncards[2047556145347195181].title\n95: Renaiss official announces Legacy Pack 8.0 will go live today at 3 PM
rows.en\ncards[2047556145347195181].summary\n: The official Renaiss account announces that Legacy Pack 8.0 will officially launch in 1 hour (Taiwan time at 3 PM). This is a routine version update for the card pack product, falling under official product release news. All collectors and players following the card pack should pay attention to the card content and market changes after the launch. No special registration or participation procedure is required; you only need to enter the game at the specified time to view the new version of the card pack.
rows.en\ncards[2047556145347195181].bullets[0: Legacy Pack 8.0 will open at 3 PM (UTC+8) on weekdays; please confirm that your wallet and network connection are normal in advance.
rows.en\ncards[2047556145347195181].bullets[1: After going live, you can go to the in-game card pack system to view the new version card list and rarity distribution.
rows.en\ncards[2047556145347195181].bullets[2: It is recommended to follow @renaissxyz for version content explanations and subsequent announcements.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].title\n4c: Renaiss participates in the Hong Kong Web3 Festival series of events and explains the CEO SBT claiming process.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].summary\n: Renaiss official thanks the community for participating in the series of events held during the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, including BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and HK TCG Tour, and explains the Event SBT claiming process. Those who are eligible need to take a photo with the CEO and publish the photo to the designated link to complete the SBT claim. Subsequently, more points and airdrop opportunities will continue to be released.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].bullets[0: You must take a photo with the CEO and publicly post it to the designated link to complete the SBT claim.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].bullets[1: The series of events this time are located in Hong Kong, with participants including BNB Chain Meetup, RWA Night, and TCG Tour.
rows.en\ncards[2047525941434572836].bullets[2: Renaiss will continue to announce subsequent point opportunities and airdrop distribution timing.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].title\n23: Renaiss Hong Kong TCG Tour Concludes During Web3 Festival, Visiting Local Card Shops
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].summary\n: Renaiss completed the Hong Kong TCG tour during the Web3 Festival, spending two days visiting Wong Tai Sin Temple, Jiaxin Mall, Xinhe Center and other locations, with CEO Winchman treating participants to open Pokemon and One Piece card boxes. The event aims to connect the physical trading card culture with on-chain collectibles, showcasing Hong Kong's dense and multi-layered card market ecosystem.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[0: Registrants can be considered fans, and you can follow the official Renaiss to get the list of future tour cities.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[1: CEO opened boxes on site at each location, participants responded enthusiastically, covering the Pokémon and One Piece series
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].bullets[2: Renaiss says it will continue to expand liquidity and participation through on-chain collections.
rows.en\ncards[2047316344258130405].glance\n4: Feature progress: Hong Kong Web3 Festival itinerary; stay tuned for the next official announcement.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss × Portaldot Online Poker Night Starts on April 24

Renaiss and Portaldot jointly host an online poker night that will open for registration this Friday (April 24) at 7:00 PM (UTC+8). Participants must register on the designated platform. The competition has a prize pool of 200 USDT to be distributed among the top 100 participants, and will provide Pokémon M3 card packs to the top 10 players, as well as Community Event SBT to the top 100 players. This is a community activity by the Renaiss ecosystem that attracts new users through gamified interactions, helping to increase the exposure of the Portaldot platform and the engagement retention of Renaiss members. It is recommended to complete registration before the deadline and follow subsequent SBT distribution announcements.
Complete registration at https://app.lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy by 19:00 on April 24.
Compete for a top 100 ranking to earn a share of 200 USDT, with Top 1-10 also receiving a Pokémon M3 card pack
After the competition ends, pay attention to whether your wallet receives the Community Event SBT airdrop notification.
SBT airdrop
Event Renaiss × Portaldot Online Poker Night starts on April 24, time: April 24, 19:00, UTC+8, key rewards: SBT, event rewards.

rows.en\ncards[2047239060704399578].summary\n: Renaiss officially released activity information on "Trading Volume and Market Growth". Time is 3PM, UTC+8. This is mainly to notify participation information; the key points are time, location, and how to join.

rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].title\n4c: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT score thresholds dynamically adjusted, snapshot time announced
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].summary\n: Renaiss official announcement: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT claim score thresholds have been updated: Bronze requires Top 40% (170 points), Silver requires Top 10% (930 points), Gold requires Top 1% (4900 points). The official specifically emphasized these thresholds are dynamic reference values, will be raised as participant numbers increase, and are not a fixed cutoff line. Snapshot time is set for April 27 at 03:00; users need to continuously increase their score before that time to reach the target tier.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[0: Snapshot time is at 03:00 on the 27th; at that time the score ranking will determine SBT claim eligibility.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[1: Bronze 170 points, Silver 930 points, Gold 4900 points are floating thresholds; the later the snapshot, the higher the thresholds may become.
rows.en\ncards[2047203430989783437].bullets[2: Users who have not yet met the target need to continuously participate in interactions to raise their score ranking.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].title\n25: Renaiss launches MFA two-factor authentication to enhance account security.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].summary\n: Renaiss officially announced that MFA two-factor authentication is officially online; users logging in via Privy can enable a 6-digit verification code on the settings page to strengthen account protection. All users should enable it as soon as possible to safeguard assets and data security.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[0: Go to the settings page to enable MFA (requires an authenticator app).
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[1: MFA must be set up via Privy login.
rows.en\ncards[2046816267122680172].bullets[2: All users are advised to enable it promptly to improve account security.

rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].title\n71: Renaiss Plaza will share SBT 2.0 and market insights tomorrow night, exploring pain points of traditional TCG.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].summary\n: Renaiss Plaza will hold a voice event tomorrow (April 17) at 21:00 UTC+8 on Discord, covering project data, SBT 2.0, points and peripheral updates, and featuring a discussion with One Piece TCG collector Ricky. The community also noted issues in the secondary market for traditional Pokémon TCG such as rampant counterfeits, settlement taking 7-14 days, fees exceeding 13%, and insufficient liquidity, reflecting potential improvements for on-chain TCG solutions. This is an official event notice; interested parties need to join the Renaiss Discord to participate.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[0: Join the Renaiss Discord at 21:00 tonight to participate in the Plaza voice chat, where the team will announce project data and SBT 2.0 progress.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[1: Pay attention to Ricky's themed discussion segment to learn about the practical experience of the One Piece TCG collector market.
rows.en\ncards[2045080953324962220].bullets[2: The issues of counterfeit and high fees in traditional Pokémon TCG highlight the potential opportunities for on-chain solutions, which can serve as a future observation entry point.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Gate and Red Bull 'Racing the Future' exhibition April 18-24 at Hong Kong K11 MUSEA.

Gate is hosting the 'Racing the Future' exhibition during the Hong Kong Web3 Festival week, celebrating its 13th anniversary and partnering with Red Bull, from April 18 to 24 at K11 MUSEA, showcasing F1-themed installations and racing cars. Web3 professionals can apply for VIP/Partner tickets via the registration page; when filling out the company field, enter 'Renaiss' to gain priority participation.
From April 18-24, visit K11 MUSEA for the Gate x Red Bull exhibition, featuring an F1 car and a 13-year milestone wall.
When applying for VIP/Partner tickets, fill in 'Renaiss' in the company field to get priority qualification.
Registration link: https://luma.com/bb5l9oa4
Community Pack Battle Event: One Piece Card Live‑Stream Guessing

Discord channel @0x1001 announces that on April 16 at 9 PM (UTC+8) it will hold a 'Community Rip Pack Event' live on Discord. This is a One Piece card game pack battle event, where 5 participants each use 3 boxes of card packs (total 72 packs) to compete for rarity. All audience members who vote or interact can receive the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT; voters also have a chance to win an officially sponsored OP‑15 card pack. By watching the live stream and predicting the final top three winners, viewers can both join the guessing game and receive SBT rewards.
Event time: April 16 at 9 PM (UTC+8) live on Discord, with 5 participants opening 72 packs to compete for rarity.
How to participate: Enter the live stream and vote to predict the final top three winners to receive SBT and be eligible for the raffle.
Audience rewards: All interactive viewers can claim the Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT, and voters also have a chance to receive an OP‑15 card pack.
One Piece TCG
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].title\n91: Comparison guide for US‑to‑Taiwan shipping consolidation services.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].summary\n: Community members share practical information about shipping Renaiss packages from the United States to Taiwan via consolidation services, comparing three providers' tax‑inclusive shipping rates, speed, and restrictions. Direct shipping incurs shipping fees plus taxes, while consolidation can reduce the cost to 170–175 NT$ per pound, making it a more economical option for users living in Taiwan. Users are advised to choose the appropriate consolidation service based on their weight needs and to be aware of each provider's minimum weight requirement and extra fees.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[0: The three consolidation services all have a tax-included price of 170 to 175 New Taiwan Dollars per pound, while only Good Luck Consolidation charges 300 New Taiwan Dollars for 1 pound.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[1: Star consolidation shipments under 20 pounds and single Good Luck consolidation shipments under 10 pounds are subject to an additional home delivery charge.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].bullets[2: When filling in the consolidation address for Renaiss, you must include your own member ID.
rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].glance\nf: The three consolidation services all have a tax-included price of 170 to 175 New Taiwan Dollars per pound, while only Good Luck Consolidation charges 300 New Taiwan Dollars for 1 pound.
rows.en\ncards[discord-1478788250687766796-14: Renaiss One Piece Card Battle | Record Pointer SBT Event

The Renaiss community on Discord launches a One Piece card game (OPTCG) live battle event, open for players to join the exclusive channel from April 11 to 25, to play friendly matches (no win/loss counted), and after completing the match they can receive the "Log Pose" SBT as an honor record, with live streaming suitable for beginners to learn competitive rules.
Join the Discord channel 「TCG-Battle-Arena」, read the pinned tutorial to obtain eligibility to participate.
Use OPTCG SIM to complete a friendly match with an opponent (no need to worry about winning or losing), and you can also watch the live stream interaction.
By April 25, players who complete the battle mission can unlock and receive the 'Record Pointer' SBT
Discord community
Real Combat Battle
One Piece Card Live Stream Opening Event: 6 Boxes Prize Giveaway

Community member @0xFEI will hold a One Piece OPCG card live opening stream on Twitter at 8:00 PM on April 9, opening 6 boxes of the 08 expansion packs as rewards for lucky viewers. Participation involves watching the stream and interacting in the live chat, the system will randomly draw lucky users from the audience, opening 2 packs of cards each time, and winners can choose to receive the physical cards via on‑site delivery (only within mainland China, shipping cost at the winner's expense). Players who draw high-value cards such as SP, SEC, and Big Head will also receive a Renaiss MVP badge in addition to the physical card. The event will feature a professional card game specialist explaining the basics of OPCG.
On April 9 at 20:00, go to Twitter to watch the live stream, and participate in the live chat to win a chance to win a prize.
Winners can claim high-value physical cards (only shipped within mainland China, shipping fee to be paid by the winner)
Winners of high-value cards receive a Renaiss MVP badge.
Live stream raffle

rows.en\nofficial_overview.summary\ncb8a2be72: This summary aggregates the main announcements and activities of the Renaiss platform from April 22 to 26, 2026, including the limited restock of Omega Pack, Region Royale Asia Invitational, launch of Legacy Pack 8.0, Hong Kong Web3 Festival series events, and rollout of MFA two-factor authentication, all of which directly impact the card market, community interaction, and account security.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[0]\n2c26b6: Renaiss officially restocked the Omega Pack on the platform on April 26, 2026, adding more than 10 S‑Tier cards, with hot card prices exceeding $1,000, and requiring players to complete a single card draw before the end of May to unlock the Omega Restock SBT. This move raises demand for high-value cards and stimulates player participation.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[1]\n162f68: Renaiss Official announced on April 25, 2026 the holding of the Region Royale invitation tournament, covering South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, and Taiwan, aiming to promote cross-regional community growth and new user expansion; the competition will soon kick off in five Asian regions, and will enhance the brand's local influence.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[2]\n99c750: Renaiss officials launched Legacy Pack 8.0 officially on April 24, 2026 at 3:00 PM Taiwan time, with a limited sale of 1,000 packs, each priced at $100 USD, offering collectors a new card lineup. The market will experience volatility and price adjustments due to the limited-time supply.
rows.en\nofficial_overview.bullets[3]\n65dbb0: Renaiss participated in the Web3 Festival series events in Hong Kong from April 22 to 24, 2026, including BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night, and TCG Tour. CEO Winchman interacted with players at card shops such as Wong Tai Sin Temple, Ka Xin Shopping Mall, and Sun Hung Kai Centre, and simultaneously launched the MFA two-factor authentication feature, strengthening account security and enhancing user trust in the platform.

rows.en\ncards[2044381540067803312].detail_li: buy and ship: Price tax-included 170NTD | Advantage: large | Disadvantage: because it can consolidate shipments from multiple countries, so it may first go to Hong Kong

Star Planet Consolidation: Price tax-included 170NTD｜Advantages: fast speed, similar to bns, many countries also offer consolidated shipping｜Disadvantage: under 20 pounds requires an additional 150NTD delivery fee

Good Luck Shipping: Price includes tax 175NTD | Advantages fast speed, discount for shipments over 10 pounds per order | Disadvantages currently only mainland and US warehouses, and if shipping only 1 pound the freight is 300
Supplement context: the recent good news is that we are preparing to open card issuance; however, direct shipping to Taiwan cost + tax should be a point of concern for everyone

시간과 장소: 4월 11일 - 4、23:59、UTC+8／온라인（Discord / Live）
rows.ko\n春季資訊刊｜OMEGA Pack 補貨與 Legacy Pack 8.0: 봄 정보지｜OMEGA Pack 보충 및 Legacy Pack 8.0 판매 급증, Region Royale 초대전이 곧 시작됩니다
rows.ko\n本週官方更新顯示，OMEGA Pack 完成補貨並釋出首批 S 卡片，L: 이번 주 공식 업데이트에 따르면 OMEGA Pack 보충이 완료되어 첫 S 카드가 출시되었으며, Legacy Pack 8.0은 단시간에 완판되어 플레이어 수요가 급증하고 있습니다. Region Royale 초대전, SBT와 포인트 시스템 도입으로 봄 시즌에 새로운 경쟁과 수집 중심의 경험을 제공할 것입니다. 향후 Poker Night, 커뮤니티 스트리밍 오픈팩 등 다양한 행사가 예정되어 있으니 많은 관심을 가져주세요.
rows.ko\nOMEGA Pack 完成補貨，首批 S 卡片已正式上線，為收藏市場注入: OMEGA Pack 보충이 완료되어 첫 S 카드가 공식 출시되어 수집 시장에 새로운 활력을 불어넣었습니다.
rows.ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0 在開賣後 22 分鐘內完售，顯示市場熱度: Legacy Pack 8.0은 출시 후 22분 안에 완판되어 시장 열기가 대단하며, 오늘 오후 3시의 공식 출시와 카드 드로우 성과 분석을 예고합니다.
rows.ko\nRegion Royale 邀請戰即將展開，配合 SBT 與積分機制，以: Region Royale 초대전이 곧 시작되며, SBT와 포인트 시스템, 그리고 곧 개최되는 Poker Night, 커뮤니티 방송 등의 활동을 통해 봄 시즌은 다양한 경쟁과 교류 기회를 맞이하게 됩니다.
rows.ko\n本段資訊涵蓋 Renaiss 官方於2026年4月23日至27日間的關鍵: 본 정보는 Renaiss 공식이 2026년 4월 23일부터 27일까지의 주요 공지를 다루며, OMEGA Pack 재입고와 첫 번째 S 카드 당첨 명단, Legacy Pack 8.0의 빠른 완판, SuperLiquid Beta 2.0의 포인트 임계값과 스냅샷 시간, 그리고 Region Royale 초대전과 홍콩 Web3 Festival 참가 등 커뮤니티 및 시장 활동을 포함하며, 이는 플레이어 자산, 생태계 인센티브 및 지역 커뮤니티 발전에 직접적인 영향을 미칩니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月26日宣布完成OMEGA Pack補貨: Renaiss 공식은 2026년 4월 26일에 OMEGA Pack 재입고를 완료하고 첫 번째 5명의 당첨 S 카드 사용자 명단을 공개했다. 보유자는 공식 페이지에서 'OMEGA Restocked S Card SBT'를 수령할 수 있으며, 이로 인해 게임 경제 시스템이 회복되고 플레이어의 블록체인 자산 무결성이 보장된다.
rows.ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0於2026年4月24日下午3時（UTC+8: Legacy Pack 8.0은 2026년 4월 24일 오후 3시 (UTC+8)에 정식 출시되었으며, 22분 만에 완판되어 시장 수요가 급증했음을 보여준다. 보유자는 플랫폼에서 새 카드 조합을 확인할 수 있으며, 구매에 실패한 플레이어는 다음 재입고 때까지 기다려야 한다.
rows.ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0於2026年4月27日凌晨3時（: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0은 2026년 4월 27일 새벽 3시(UTC)에 스냅샷을 진행하며, 점수 기준에 따라 세 등급으로 나뉘며(Top 40%는 170점, Top 10%는 930점, Top 1%는 4900점 필요), 조건에 부합하는 참가자는 해당 SBT 보상을 받게 되며, 베타 플레이어의 배치와 향후 생태계 인센티브 배분에 영향을 미칩니다.
rows.ko\nRenaiss於2026年4月25日宣布舉行Region Royale邀: Renaiss는 2026년 4월 25일에 Region Royale 초대전을 개최한다고 발표했으며, 한국, 태국, 말레이시아, 싱가포르, 대만 5개 지역의 플레이어들이 팀을 이루어 참가하도록 초대하여, 신규 사용자 증가와 지역 사회 강화를 목표로 하고 있습니다. 동시에 같은 달 24일에 홍콩 Web3 Festival에 참가하여 CEO 사진 SBT를 발급받을 수 있도록 하여, 수집가들과 협력 업체들이 이후 생태계에 참여하도록 이끌었습니다.

rows.ko\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 階段即將告終，官方宣布積分將重: Superliquid Beta 2.0 단계가 곧 마무리되고, 공식적으로 포인트가 리셋되어 다음 라운드를 맞이하게 됩니다. 기존 사용자의 단계 순위는 획득 가능한 SBT 등급 임계값을 직접 결정합니다: 상위 40%는 Elite, 상위 10%는 Prime, 상위 1%는 Apex. 이 소식은 Beta 2.0이 막바지에 접어들었음을 보여주며, 보유자는 현재 순위를 확인하여 획득 가능한 SBT 등급과 해당 혜택을 평가해야 합니다.

ko\n春季資訊刊｜OMEGA Pack 補貨與 Legacy Pack 8.0: 봄 정보 이슈｜오메가 팩 보충 및 레거시 팩 8.0 인기 판매, 리전 로얄 초대전 곧 시작됩니다
ko\n本週官方更新顯示，OMEGA Pack 完成補貨並釋出首批 S 卡片，L: 이번 주 공식 업데이트에 따르면 오메가 팩이 보충되고 S 카드의 첫 번째 배치가 출시되었으며 레거시 팩 8.0이 단기간에 매진되어 높은 플레이어 수요를 나타냈습니다. Region Royale 초대 전투, SBT 및 포인트 메커니즘의 출시로 봄 시즌에 새로운 경쟁 및 컬렉션 드라이버가 도입될 것입니다. 앞으로도 포커 나이트, 커뮤니티 라이브 방송 팩 오픈 등 다양한 이벤트가 진행될 예정이니 많은 관심 부탁드립니다.
ko\nOMEGA Pack 完成補貨，首批 S 卡片已正式上線，為收藏市場注入: 오메가 팩이 보충되고 첫 번째 S 카드가 공식 출시되어 컬렉션 시장에 새로운 모멘텀을 불어넣었습니다.
ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0 在開賣後 22 分鐘內完售，顯示市場熱度: 레거시팩 8.0은 판매 시작 22분 만에 완판되며 시장의 뜨거운 인기를 실감케 했고, 오늘 오후 3시에는 정식 출시와 카드 드로잉 성능 분석도 미리 선보인다.
ko\nRegion Royale 邀請戰即將展開，配合 SBT 與積分機制，以: 리전 로얄 초청전이 곧 시작됩니다. SBT 및 포인트 메커니즘은 물론 다가오는 Poker Night, 커뮤니티 라이브 방송 및 기타 활동을 통해 봄 시즌은 다양한 경쟁과 상호작용 기회를 제공할 것입니다.
ko\n本段資訊涵蓋 Renaiss 官方於2026年4月23日至27日間的關鍵: 이 정보는 2026년 4월 23일부터 27일 사이에 오메가 팩 보충 및 첫 번째 S 카드 당첨 목록, 레거시 팩 8.0의 빠른 판매, SuperLiquid Beta 2.0의 포인트 임계값 및 스냅샷 시간, 지역 로얄 초대 전투 및 홍콩 Web3 페스티벌 참여와 같은 커뮤니티 및 시장 활동을 포함하여 2026년 4월 23일부터 27일 사이에 Renaiss가 발표한 주요 공식 발표를 다룹니다. 이 모든 내용은 플레이어 자산, 생태학적 인센티브, 그리고 지역사회 발전.
ko\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月26日宣布完成OMEGA Pack補貨: 르네이스는 2026년 4월 26일 오메가 팩 보충 완료를 공식 발표하고, 최초 5명의 S 카드 당첨자 명단을 발표했습니다. 소지자는 공식 페이지에서 'OMEGA 재입고 S 카드 SBT'를 받으실 수 있습니다. 이는 게임의 경제 시스템을 복원하고 플레이어의 블록체인 자산의 무결성을 보호합니다.
ko\nLegacy Pack 8.0於2026年4月24日下午3時（UTC+8: Legacy Pack 8.0은 2026년 4월 24일 오후 3시(UTC+8)에 공식 출시되었습니다. 단 22분 만에 매진돼 높은 시장 수요를 나타냈다. 소지자는 플랫폼에서 새로운 카드 조합을 확인할 수 있습니다. 아직 획득하지 못한 플레이어는 다음 보충을 기다려야 합니다.
ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0於2026年4月27日凌晨3時（: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0은 2026년 4월 27일 오전 3시(UTC)에 스냅샷을 찍고 포인트 임계값에 따라 세 가지 수준으로 나뉩니다(상위 40%에는 170포인트 필요, 상위 10%에는 930포인트 필요, 상위 1%에는 4900포인트 필요). 자격을 갖춘 참가자는 해당 SBT 보상을 받게 되며 이는 베타 플레이어 레이아웃 및 향후 생태학적 인센티브 배포에 영향을 미칩니다.
ko\nRenaiss於2026年4月25日宣布舉行Region Royale邀: 르네이스는 2026년 4월 25일 한국, 태국, 말레이시아, 싱가포르, 대만의 플레이어를 초대하여 신규 사용자의 성장을 촉진하고 지역 커뮤니티를 강화하는 것을 목표로 팀을 구성하여 참가할 리전 로얄 초대 대회를 발표했습니다. 같은 달 24일 홍콩 웹3 페스티벌에도 참가해 CEO 사진을 공개해 SBT를 받는 등 컬렉터와 파트너들이 후속 생태계에 참여할 수 있도록 유도했다.

The launch of Region Royale invitational battles, SBT and point mechanisms will bring new competition and collection drivers to the spring season. en\n本段資訊涵蓋 Renaiss 官方於2026年4月23日至27日間的關鍵: This information covers key official announcements from Renaiss between April 23 and 27, 2026, including the OMEGA Pack replenishment and the first batch of S card winning lists, the rapid sale of Legacy Pack 8.0, the points threshold and snapshot time of SuperLiquid Beta 2.0, as well as community and market activities such as the Region Royale invitational battle and participation in the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, all of which have a direct impact on player assets, ecological incentives, and regional community development.
en\nRenaiss官方於2026年4月26日宣布完成OMEGA Pack補貨: Renaiss officially announced the completion of OMEGA Pack replenishment on April 26, 2026, and announced the list of the first five winning S card users. Holders can receive "OMEGA Restocked S Card SBT" on the official page. This restores the game's economic system and protects the integrity of players' blockchain assets.
en\nLegacy Pack 8.0於2026年4月24日下午3時（UTC+8: Legacy Pack 8.0 was officially launched at 3:00 pm on April 24, 2026 (UTC+8). It was sold out in just 22 minutes, indicating high market demand. Holders can check the new card combination on the platform. Players who have not grabbed it need to wait for the next replenishment.
en\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0於2026年4月27日凌晨3時（: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 will take a snapshot at 3 a.m. on April 27, 2026 (UTC), and will be divided into three levels according to the points threshold (Top 40% requires 170 points, Top 10% requires 930 points, and Top 1% requires 4900 points). Qualified participants will receive corresponding SBT rewards, which will affect the Beta player layout and future ecological incentive distribution.
en\nRenaiss於2026年4月25日宣布舉行Region Royale邀: Renaiss announced the Region Royale invitational competition on April 25, 2026, inviting players from South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore and Taiwan to form teams to participate, aiming to promote the growth of new users and strengthen the local community; it also participated in the Hong Kong Web3 Festival on the 24th of the same month, and opened the CEO's photo to receive SBT, attracting collectors and partners to participate in the subsequent ecology.

ko\nRenaiss 官方宣布 OMEGA Pack 完成補貨，首批 5 位抽: 르네이스는 오메가 팩이 보충되었음을 공식적으로 발표했으며, S카드를 획득한 최초 5명의 사용자를 발표하고 축하했습니다. 이번 보충을 기념하기 위해 "OMEGA 재입고 S 카드 SBT"가 공식 출시되어 보유자들이 수집할 수 있습니다. 이 메시지는 게임의 경제 시스템이 재개되었음을 의미합니다. S 카드를 보유하거나 구매하려는 플레이어는 블록체인 자산의 무결성을 보장하기 위해 공식 SBT 수집 페이지에 주의를 기울여야 합니다.

ko\nDiscordTCG社群成員0x1001宣布，針對海賊王卡牌遊戲的對戰活: DiscordTCG 커뮤니티 회원 0x1001은 원피스 카드 게임의 배틀 이벤트 마감일이 2026년 4월 30일(UTC+8) 23:59까지 연장되었다고 발표했습니다. 주된 이유는 많은 플레이어가 아직 기록 포인터를 받지 못했기 때문입니다. 원래 OPTCGsim 외에도 참여 플랫폼은 플레이어가 경쟁할 수 있도록 커뮤니티 구성원이 만든 yyclub을 공식적으로 추가했습니다. 이벤트 참여 방법은 0x1001 또는 다른 회원에게 적극적으로 연락해 전투를 주선하는 것입니다. 원피스 카드 커뮤니티 내의 소규모 대회입니다. 관심 있는 플레이어는 등록 마감일을 준수해야 합니다.
ko\n截止時間延至4/30，需主動聯繫0x1001或另一成員安排對戰: 마감일이 4/30까지 연장되었습니다. 전투를 준비하려면 0x1001 또는 다른 멤버에게 연락해야 합니다.
ko\n參與平台新增yyclub，亦可使用原有OPTCGsim進行對戰: 참가 플랫폼에 yyclub이 추가되었으며, 오리지널 OPTCGsim을 사용해 경쟁할 수도 있습니다.

ko\nRenaiss 官方發布「卡包與抽卡表現」官方公告。重點是 Legacy: 르네이스가 '카드팩 및 카드 드로잉 퍼포먼스' 공식 발표를 발표했습니다. 초점은 새로운 레거시 팩 카드 패키지와 가격대 업데이트에 있습니다. 이번 업데이트는 이후 사용 과정에 영향을 미치므로 공식 세부 사항을 따라야 합니다.

ko\n你要做什麼：先確認生效時間與開放條件，再安排操作。: 해야 할 일: 먼저 유효 시간과 개방 조건을 확인한 다음 작업을 준비하십시오.
ko\nRenaiss 官方帳號預告 Legacy Pack 8.0 版本將在一: 르네이스 공식 계정에서는 레거시 팩 8.0 버전이 1시간 후에 정식 출시될 예정이며, SBT 생태계에 속한 카드 팩이 정기적으로 업데이트될 예정이라고 밝혔습니다. 보유자는 출시 후 플랫폼에서 새로운 콘텐츠와 카드 조합을 볼 수 있습니다.
ko\n追蹤 Renaiss 官帳確認 8.0 版本上線公告: Renaiss 공식 계정을 팔로우하여 버전 8.0 출시 발표를 확인하세요.
ko\n登入平台檢視 Legacy Pack 8.0 新卡牌陣容: 레거시 팩 8.0의 새로운 카드 라인업을 보려면 플랫폼에 로그인하세요.
ko\n查看是否解鎖新版 pack 的領取或交易資格: 새 버전의 팩을 받거나 거래할 자격이 있는지 확인하세요.
ko\nRenaiss 香港 Web3 Festival 參展回顧與 CEO: 르네상스 홍콩 Web3 페스티벌 전시 리뷰 및 CEO 사진 SBT 컬렉션 행사
ko\nRenaiss 官方帳號回顧香港 Web3 Festival 參展行程，: Renaiss 공식 계정은 BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night 및 HK TCG Tour의 세 가지 이벤트를 다루는 홍콩 Web3 페스티벌 전시회 일정을 검토했습니다. 이와 동시에 CEO 사진을 위한 SBT 컬렉션도 오픈했다. CEO와 사진을 찍어 X 플랫폼에 게시하면 됩니다. 후속 생태계 참여에 관심이 있는 수집가 및 파트너에게 적합합니다.
ko\nRenaiss 已參與 BNB Chain Super Meetup、R: Renaiss는 BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night 및 HK TCG Tour의 세 가지 홍콩 이벤트에 참여했습니다.
ko\nCEO 合照 SBT：與 CEO 合照並將照片發布至 X 平台即可 cl: CEO 사진 SBT: CEO와 사진을 찍고 X 플랫폼에 사진을 게시하여 소유권을 주장합니다.
ko\n有興趣者可在 X 搜尋官方帳號 @renaissxyz 追蹤後續 SBT: 관심 있는 당사자는 X의 공식 계정 @renaissxyz를 검색하여 후속 SBT 및 협력 정보를 추적할 수 있습니다.
ko\nRenaiss 社群在香港 Web3 Festival 期間完成為期兩天: 르네상스 커뮤니티는 홍콩 Web3 페스티벌 기간 동안 2일간의 TCG 투어를 마쳤으며, 웡타이신 사원과 여러 지역 카드 매장, 수집가 모임 장소를 방문하고 현장 방문을 통해 홍콩 TCG 문화의 밀도와 다양성을 보여주었습니다. CEO는 커뮤니티 구성원 간의 카드 교환과 지식 공유를 촉진하기 위해 참가자들을 매장에서 포켓몬과 원피스 카드 팩을 개봉하도록 초대했습니다. 이 활동은 완료된 커뮤니티 경험의 기록이며 후속 참여 정보는 포함되지 않습니다.
ko\nRenaiss 已結束香港 TCG Tour，參與者走訪黃大仙祠進行「神: 르네이스가 홍콩 TCG 투어를 마쳤습니다. 참가자들은 '하나님의 팩 기도'를 위해 웡타이신 사원과 여러 지역 카드 매장을 방문했습니다.
ko\nCEO 在 Smiling Plaza、Sino Centre 等地請參: CEO는 참가자들에게 스마일링 플라자, 시노 센터 등에서 포켓몬 및 원피스 카드 팩 상자를 열어 소통을 촉진합니다.
ko\n此為社群體驗回顧，無報名或參與管道資訊: 커뮤니티 경험 리뷰입니다. 등록이나 참여 채널 정보가 없습니다.
ko\nRenaiss 與 Portaldot 共同舉辦線上撲克之夜，時間定於4: Renaiss와 Portaldot은 4월 24일 금요일 저녁(UTC+8) 19:00에 공동으로 온라인 포커의 밤을 개최할 예정입니다. Lepoker 플랫폼을 통해 등록이 가능합니다. 이벤트 보상에는 200 USDT 상금 풀, 포켓몬 M3 카드 팩(1~10위), 커뮤니티 활동 SBT(1~100위)가 포함됩니다. 참가자는 포커에 참여하고 플랫폼 등록을 완료할 의지가 있어야 합니다. Web3 소셜 활동에 관심이 있는 플레이어 및 카드 수집가에게 적합합니다.
ko\n4月24日19:00 UTC+8 準時參與線上撲克賽: 4월 24일 19:00 UTC+8 정시에 온라인 포커 대회에 참가하세요.
ko\n前十名可獲寶可夢 M3 卡包，前百名可得 SBT: 상위 10위는 포켓몬 M3 카드 팩을 받게 되며, 상위 100위는 SBT를 받게 됩니다.
ko\nRenaiss 官方釋出「交易量與市場成長」活動資訊。時間為 3PM、U: 르네이스가 '거래량 및 시장 성장' 이벤트 정보를 공식 공개했습니다. 시간은 오후 3시(UTC+8)입니다. 본 글은 주로 참여정보를 알리는 데 활용되며, 핵심은 시간, 장소, 참여방법입니다.
ko\n活動重點：Legacy Pack 卡包上新與價格區間更新: 활동 초점: Legacy Pack 신규 카드 패키지 및 가격대 업데이트
ko\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT 積分門檻更新，快照定於: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT 포인트 임계값이 업데이트되었으며 스냅샷은 4월 27일로 예정되어 있습니다.
ko\nRenaiss 官方公布 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SB: Renaiss는 공식적으로 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT 수신 기준을 발표했습니다. 세 가지 수준이 있습니다. 상위 40%에는 170점이 필요하고, 상위 10%에는 930점이 필요하며, 상위 1%에는 4900점이 필요합니다. 스냅샷 시간은 4월 27일 3:00 UTC로 예정되어 있으며 모든 Beta 2.0 참여자는 그 전에 자신의 포인트가 기준을 충족하는지 확인해야 합니다. 공식 알림 임계값은 즉각적인 참조 값이며 아직 수정되지 않았습니다. 사용자 증가에 따라 변동될 예정입니다. 우리는 최신 데이터를 지속적으로 추적할 것을 요구합니다.
ko\nBeta 2.0 參與者須在快照前確認積分：Top 40% 門檻 170: 베타 2.0 참가자는 스냅샷을 찍기 전에 자신의 포인트를 확인해야 합니다. 상위 40% 기준은 170포인트, 상위 10% 기준은 930포인트, 상위 1% 기준은 4900포인트입니다.
ko\n快照時間定於 4 月 27 日凌晨 3:00 UTC，逾期積分不列入計算: 스냅샷 시간은 4월 27일 3:00 UTC로 설정되며, 연체된 포인트는 계산에 포함되지 않습니다.
ko\n積分線為動態門檻將隨參與人數增加而上調，需持續關注即時數據變化: 포인트 라인은 참가자 수가 증가함에 따라 증가하는 동적 임계값입니다. 실시간 데이터 변경에 계속해서 주의를 기울여야 합니다.
ko\nRenaiss 平台已正式上線 MFA（多重驗證）功能。透過 Privy: 르네상스 플랫폼이 MFA(다중 인증) 기능을 공식 출시했습니다. 이제 Privy를 통해 로그인하는 사용자는 설정 페이지에서 인증 앱을 지원하는 6자리 확인 코드를 활성화하여 계정 보안을 한층 더 강화할 수 있습니다. 모든 Privy 사용자는 계정 보안을 강화하기 위해 가능한 한 빨리 이 기능을 활성화해야 합니다.
ko\n每次登入需輸入 6 位數驗證碼完成驗證: 로그인할 때마다 6자리 인증번호를 입력해야 인증이 완료됩니다.
ko\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 即將結束 排名決定 SBT 等: Superliquid Beta 2.0이 곧 종료됩니다. 순위에 따라 SBT 레벨이 결정됩니다.
ko\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 階段即將告終，官方宣布積分將重: Superliquid Beta 2.0 단계가 종료되고 있으며 관계자는 다음 라운드에서 포인트가 재설정될 것이라고 발표했습니다. 기존 사용자의 스테이지 순위에 따라 사용 가능한 SBT 레벨 임계값이 직접 결정됩니다. 상위 40%는 Elite를 획득하고 상위 10%는 Prime을 획득하며 상위 1%는 Apex를 획득하게 됩니다. 이 메시지는 베타 2.0이 종료됨을 알리며, 보유자는 사용 가능한 SBT 수준과 그에 따른 혜택을 평가하기 위해 현재 순위를 확인해야 합니다.
ko\n確認自己在 Beta 2.0 階段的排名比例是否符合目標 SBT 等級門: 베타 2.0 단계의 순위 비율이 목표 SBT 수준 임계값을 충족하는지 확인하세요.
ko\n積分將於新一輪重置，下一階段的參與資格與條件待官方後續公告: 새로운 라운드에서는 포인트가 초기화되며, 다음 스테이지 참여 자격 및 조건은 추후 공식적으로 공지됩니다.
ko\nSBT 等級分為 Elite（前 40%）、Prime（前 10%）、A: SBT 레벨은 Elite(상위 40%), Prime(상위 10%), Apex(상위 1%)의 세 가지 레벨로 나뉩니다.
ko\nRenaiss Plaza 將於明晚（4月17日）21:00 UTC+8: Renaiss Plaza는 내일 밤(4월 17일) 21:00 UTC+8에 Discord에서 음성 이벤트를 개최하여 프로젝트 데이터, SBT 2.0, 포인트 및 주변 업데이트를 다루고 원피스 TCG 컬렉션 플레이어 Ricky를 초대하여 대화를 나눌 예정입니다. 커뮤니티에서는 또한 전통적인 포켓몬 TCG 2차 시장이 위조품의 확산, 결제에 7~14일 소요, 13%를 초과하는 처리 수수료, 유동성 부족 등의 문제를 안고 있다고 언급했는데, 이는 온체인 TCG 솔루션의 개선 여지가 있음을 반영합니다. 본 이벤트는 공식 이벤트 공지이며, 관심 있는 분들은 Renaiss Discord에 접속하셔야 참여하실 수 있습니다.
ko\n今晚21:00加入Renaiss Discord參與 Plaza 語音，: Plaza Voice에 참여하려면 오늘 밤 21시에 Renaissance Discord에 가입하세요. 관계자들은 프로젝트 데이터와 SBT 2.0 진행 상황을 발표할 예정입니다.
ko\n關注 Ricky 主題對談環節，了解 One Piece TCG 收藏市: 컬렉션 시장에서 One Piece TCG의 실제 경험을 알아보려면 Ricky의 주제 대화 세션에 주목하세요.
ko\n傳統寶可夢 TCG 假貨與高費用問題突顯鏈上方案的潛在機會，可作為後續觀: 전통적인 포켓몬 TCG의 위조 문제와 높은 수수료 문제는 후속 관찰을 위한 진입점으로 사용될 수 있는 온체인 솔루션의 잠재적인 기회를 강조합니다.
ko\nGate與Red Bull於2026年4月18日至24日在香港尖沙咀K1: Gate와 Red Bull은 Web3 페스티벌 주기의 일환으로 2026년 4월 18일부터 24일까지 홍콩 침사추이 K11 MUSEA에서 "Racing the Future" 전시회를 공동 주최할 예정입니다. 현장에는 Formula One 테마 설치물, Gate의 13주년 기념 이정표 벽 및 경주용 자동차 디스플레이가 있습니다. VIP 또는 파트너 티켓 등록 시 '회사 또는 프로젝트' 항목에 '르네상스'를 입력하셔야 우선 입장이 가능합니다. 행사는 매일 오전 10시부터 오후 10시까지 진행되며 장소가 제한되어 있습니다. 이번 전시회는 Gate.io가 실제 이벤트 시장에 진출하기 위한 중요한 마케팅 활동입니다. 대상 청중은 암호화폐 투자자, Web3 매니아, 모터스포츠 팬입니다. 앞으로 르네상스 관련 협력에 대한 더 자세한 내용이 공개될지 추적할 수 있습니다.
ko\n展覽時間為2026年4月18日至24日，地點在香港K11 MUSEA，每: 전시회는 2026년 4월 18일부터 24일까지 홍콩 K11 MUSEA에서 하루 10시간 개방됩니다.
ko\n報名VIP或Partner票券時需填寫「Renaiss」作為公司名稱才能: VIP 또는 파트너 티켓 등록 시, 회사명을 "Renaiss"로 입력하셔야 우선권을 받으실 수 있습니다.
ko\n報名連結為https://luma.com/bb5l9oa4，建議使用電: 등록 링크는 https://luma.com/bb5l9oa4입니다. 확인 알림을 받으려면 이메일로 등록하는 것이 좋습니다.
ko\nDiscord 社群舉辦 One Piece 卡牌遊戲直播開包对战活動，: 디스코드 커뮤니티에서 원피스 카드게임 라이브 팩 오픈 배틀 이벤트를 진행했습니다. 5명의 참가자가 각각 카드 팩 3박스(총 72팩)를 들고 희귀성 경쟁을 펼쳤습니다. 생방송 상호작용에 참여하거나 상위 3명 예측 투표에 참여하는 시청자는 커뮤니티 립 팩 이벤트 서바이버 SBT를 받을 수 있습니다. 유권자들은 또한 공식 후원을 받는 OP-15 카드 팩을 얻을 수 있는 기회도 갖게 됩니다. 이 이벤트는 언박싱의 즐거움과 커뮤니티 예측 게임을 결합하여 OP 카드 팬들에게 시청하고 상호 작용할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다. 관심 있는 플레이어는 Discord 라이브 링크에 주의를 기울이고 이벤트 당일 영업 시간을 작성해야 합니다.
ko\n4月16日 21:00 準時進入 Discord 直播觀看開包对战: 4월 16일 21시 디스코드 라이브 방송에 접속하시면 팩 오픈 배틀을 시청하실 수 있습니다.
ko\n直播中參與投票預測前三名，有機會獲得 OP-15 卡包: 생방송 중 투표에 참여해 상위 3명을 예측하고 OP-15 카드팩을 획득할 수 있는 기회를 잡아보세요
ko\n完成互動或投票後留意表單開放，領取 Survivor SBT: 상호작용 또는 투표를 완료한 후 양식 열기에 주의하고 생존자 SBT를 받으세요.
ko\n@0x1001釋出「SBT 與積分機制」活動資訊。時間為 4月11日 -: @0x1001 님이 "SBT 및 포인트 메커니즘" 이벤트 정보를 공개했습니다. 시간은 4월 11~4일 23:59, UTC+8입니다. 장소는 온라인(Discord/Live)입니다. 주요 트리거는 SBT입니다. SBT 획득 방법: SBT 전투 임무를 완료하여 독점 **"기록 포인터" SBT** 자격을 잠금 해제하세요... 이러한 활동에는 명확한 인센티브가 있으며 일반적으로 참여율과 커뮤니티 확산이 증가합니다.
ko\n一位社群成員在 Renaiss 平台購入超夢卡後觀察市場行情，指出該卡價: 한 커뮤니티 회원은 르네상스 플랫폼에서 뮤투 카드를 구매한 후 시장 상황을 관찰한 후 카드 가격이 약 380u까지 올랐고, 오프라인에서 받은 동일한 카드의 가치도 상승했다고 지적했습니다. 이 플레이어는 불운한 참가자가 2차 시장에서 진입을 시도할 수 있다고 제안했으며 실제 카드를 받기를 기대하고 있다고 밝혔습니다. 이번 공유는 가상 및 현실 시장의 포켓몬 SBT 가격 동향을 반영하며, 카드의 투자 가치를 고민하는 플레이어들에게 참고 자료로 활용될 수 있습니다.
ko\nRenaiss 超夢卡報價約 380u，較購入成本已有明顯漲幅: 르네이스 차오멩 카드는 380u 정도에 견적이 나와 있는데, 이는 구매 비용에 비해 대폭 늘어난 금액이다.
ko\n實體卡開放領取時間尚未公布，建議持續關注官方動態: 실물 카드 수령 개시 시간은 아직 발표되지 않았습니다. 계속해서 공식 업데이트에 주의를 기울이는 것이 좋습니다.
ko\n新手可透過二級市場途徑進場，建議先完成平台註冊: 초보자는 2차 시장을 통해 시장에 진입할 수 있습니다. 먼저 플랫폼 등록을 완료하는 것이 좋습니다.
en\nRenaiss 官方宣布 OMEGA Pack 完成補貨，首批 5 位抽: Renaiss officially announced that the OMEGA Pack has been replenished, and the first five users who won the S card were announced and congratulated. To celebrate this round of replenishment, the official launch of "OMEGA Restocked S Card SBT" is available for holders to collect. This message means that the game's economic system has resumed operation. Players who hold or want to purchase S cards should pay attention to the official SBT collection page to ensure the integrity of the blockchain assets.
en\n官方已補貨 OMEGA Pack，恢復遊戲內卡包供應: OMEGA Pack has been officially replenished and the supply of in-game card packs has been resumed.
en\n首批 5 位 S 卡片持有者已出爐，含 _C9_C9、Tobyye 等: The first 5 S card holders have been released, including _C9_C9, Tobyye, etc.
en\n新上線「OMEGA Restocked S Card SBT」供 S 卡: Newly launched "OMEGA Restocked S Card SBT" for S card holders to claim
en\nDiscordTCG社群成員0x1001宣布，針對海賊王卡牌遊戲的對戰活: DiscordTCG community member 0x1001 announced that the deadline for the battle event for the One Piece card game has been extended to 23:59 on April 30, 2026 (UTC+8). The main reason is that many players have not yet received the record pointer. In addition to the original OPTCGsim, the participating platform has officially added yyclub created by community members for players to compete. The way to participate in the event is to proactively contact 0x1001 or another member to arrange a battle. It is a small competition within the One Piece card community. Interested players must seize the deadline to register.
en\n截止時間延至4/30，需主動聯繫0x1001或另一成員安排對戰: The deadline has been extended to 4/30. You need to contact 0x1001 or another member to arrange a battle.
en\n參與平台新增yyclub，亦可使用原有OPTCGsim進行對戰: yyclub has been added to the participating platform, and you can also use the original OPTCGsim to compete.
en\n尚未領取紀錄指針的玩家請把握最後機會以免失效: Players who have not yet received the record pointer should seize the last chance to avoid losing it.
en\nRenaiss官方宣布「Region Royale」邀請戰即將舉行，韓國: Renaiss officially announced that the "Region Royale" invitational competition will be held soon. South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore and Taiwan will participate. The goal is to promote the growth of new users and strengthen the local community. Rewards are ready and calls on all regions to prepare.
en\n關注官方公告確認參與方式: Follow the official announcement to confirm how to participate
en\n留意各地區社群公告與獎勵內容: Pay attention to community announcements and rewards in various regions
en\n準備新用戶推薦名單以支持在地社區: Prepare a referral list for new users to support local communities
en\nRenaiss 與 Portaldot 宣布於今晚 8 點共同舉辦 Po: Renaiss and Portaldot announced that they will jointly host a Poker Night online event at 8pm tonight, and will provide registration links for players to participate. Rewards include the Portaldot prize pool of 200 USDT and Renaiss exclusive rewards. Top 1-10 will receive Pokémon M3 card packs. The event serves both the blockchain community and Pokémon card enthusiasts, and is a cross-circle interactive event.
en\n今晚 8 點透過報名連結加入，獎池包含 200 USDT 可瓜分: Join through the registration link at 8pm tonight, and the prize pool includes 200 USDT to share
en\nRenaiss Top 1-10 名玩家可額外領取寶可夢 M3 卡包獎勵: Renaiss Top 1-10 players can receive additional Pokémon M3 card pack rewards
en\n持 Renaiss SBT 的玩家關注社區活動頁面，可解鎖專屬福利: Players holding Renaiss SBT can unlock exclusive benefits by following the community activity page
en\nRenaiss 官方發布「卡包與抽卡表現」官方公告。重點是 Legacy: Renaiss officially released the official announcement of "Card Packs and Card Drawing Performance". The focus is on the new Legacy Pack card packages and price range updates. This update will affect the subsequent use process, so you need to follow the official details
en\n更新重點：Legacy Pack 卡包上新與價格區間更新: Update focus: Legacy Pack card package updates and price range updates
en\n你要做什麼：先確認生效時間與開放條件，再安排操作。: What you have to do: First confirm the effective time and opening conditions, and then arrange the operation.
en\nRenaiss 官方帳號預告 Legacy Pack 8.0 版本將在一: The Renaiss official account announced that the Legacy Pack 8.0 version will be officially launched in one hour, and card packs belonging to the SBT ecosystem will be updated regularly. Holders can view the new content and card combinations on the platform after release.
en\n追蹤 Renaiss 官帳確認 8.0 版本上線公告: Follow Renaiss official account to confirm version 8.0 launch announcement
en\n登入平台檢視 Legacy Pack 8.0 新卡牌陣容: Log in to the platform to view the new card lineup of Legacy Pack 8.0
en\n查看是否解鎖新版 pack 的領取或交易資格: Check whether you are eligible to receive or trade the new version of the pack
en\nRenaiss 香港 Web3 Festival 參展回顧與 CEO: Renaiss Hong Kong Web3 Festival exhibition review and CEO photo SBT collection event
en\nRenaiss 官方帳號回顧香港 Web3 Festival 參展行程，: The Renaiss official account reviewed the Hong Kong Web3 Festival exhibition schedule, covering three events: BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night and HK TCG Tour. It also opened SBT collection for CEO photos at the same time. Just take a photo with the CEO and publish it to the X platform to claim. It is suitable for collectors and partners who are interested in participating in the subsequent ecology.
en\nRenaiss 已參與 BNB Chain Super Meetup、R: Renaiss has participated in three Hong Kong events: BNB Chain Super Meetup, RWA Night and HK TCG Tour
en\nCEO 合照 SBT：與 CEO 合照並將照片發布至 X 平台即可 cl: CEO photo SBT: Take a photo with the CEO and publish the photo to the X platform to claim
en\n有興趣者可在 X 搜尋官方帳號 @renaissxyz 追蹤後續 SBT: Interested parties can search the official account @renaissxyz on X to track follow-up SBT and cooperation information
en\nRenaiss 社群在香港 Web3 Festival 期間完成為期兩天: The Renaiss community completed a two-day TCG tour during the Hong Kong Web3 Festival, visiting Wong Tai Sin Temple, many local card shops and collectors’ gathering places, and demonstrated the density and diversity of Hong Kong’s TCG culture through on-site visits. The CEO invited participants to open Pokémon and One Piece card packs in the store to promote card exchange and knowledge sharing among community members. This activity is a record of completed community experience and does not include subsequent participation information.
en\nRenaiss 已結束香港 TCG Tour，參與者走訪黃大仙祠進行「神: Renaiss has completed the Hong Kong TCG Tour. Participants visited Wong Tai Sin Temple for "God Pack Prayer" and many local card stores
en\nCEO 在 Smiling Plaza、Sino Centre 等地請參: The CEO invites participants to open boxes of Pokémon and One Piece card packs at Smiling Plaza, Sino Center and other places to promote communication
en\n此為社群體驗回顧，無報名或參與管道資訊: This is a community experience review, there is no registration or participation channel information
en\nRenaiss 與 Portaldot 共同舉辦線上撲克之夜，時間定於4: Renaiss and Portaldot will jointly host an online poker night, scheduled for 19:00 on Friday evening, April 24 (UTC+8). Registration is open through the Lepoker platform. Event rewards include a 200 USDT prize pool, Pokémon M3 card packs (ranking 1 to 10) and community activity SBT (ranking 1 to 100). Participants must be willing to compete in poker and complete platform registration. It is suitable for players and card collectors who are interested in Web3 social activities.
en\n至 https://app.lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy 完: Go to https://app.lepoker.io/m/95pKmWy to complete the registration
en\n4月24日19:00 UTC+8 準時參與線上撲克賽: Participate in the online poker competition on time at 19:00 UTC+8 on April 24th
en\n前十名可獲寶可夢 M3 卡包，前百名可得 SBT: The top ten will receive Pokémon M3 card packs, and the top 100 will receive SBT.
en\nSuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT 積分門檻更新，快照定於: SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT points threshold updated, snapshot scheduled for 4/27
en\nRenaiss 官方公布 SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SB: Renaiss officially announced the threshold for receiving SuperLiquid Beta 2.0 SBT. There are three levels: Top 40% requires 170 points, Top 10% requires 930 points, and Top 1% requires 4900 points. The snapshot time is scheduled for 3:00 UTC on April 27, and all Beta 2.0 participants need to confirm whether their points meet the standards before that. The official reminder threshold is an immediate reference value and has not been fixed yet. It will fluctuate with the increase of users. We call for continuous tracking of the latest data.
en\nBeta 2.0 參與者須在快照前確認積分：Top 40% 門檻 170: Beta 2.0 participants must confirm their points before taking the snapshot: Top 40% threshold is 170 points, Top 10% threshold is 930 points, Top 1% threshold is 4900 points
en\n快照時間定於 4 月 27 日凌晨 3:00 UTC，逾期積分不列入計算: The snapshot time is set at 3:00 UTC on April 27th, and overdue points will not be included in the calculation.
en\n積分線為動態門檻將隨參與人數增加而上調，需持續關注即時數據變化: The points line is a dynamic threshold that will increase as the number of participants increases. You need to continue to pay attention to real-time data changes.
en\nRenaiss 平台已正式上線 MFA（多重驗證）功能。透過 Privy: The Renaiss platform has officially launched the MFA (multiple authentication) function. Users logging in through Privy can now enable 6-digit verification codes that support authenticator apps on the settings page to add an additional layer of account security. All Privy users should enable this as soon as possible to increase account security.
en\n每次登入需輸入 6 位數驗證碼完成驗證: Each time you log in, you need to enter a 6-digit verification code to complete the verification.
en\n目前僅支援 Privy 登入方式: Currently only supports Privy login method
en\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 即將結束 排名決定 SBT 等: Superliquid Beta 2.0 is about to end. Ranking determines SBT level.
en\nSuperliquid Beta 2.0 階段即將告終，官方宣布積分將重: The Superliquid Beta 2.0 phase is coming to an end, and officials have announced that points will be reset for the next round. The stage ranking of existing users will directly determine the SBT level threshold available: the top 40% will get Elite, the top 10% will get Prime, and the top 1% will get Apex. This message reveals that Beta 2.0 is coming to an end, and holders should confirm the current ranking to evaluate the available SBT levels and corresponding benefits.
en\n確認自己在 Beta 2.0 階段的排名比例是否符合目標 SBT 等級門: Confirm whether your ranking ratio in the Beta 2.0 phase meets the target SBT level threshold
en\n積分將於新一輪重置，下一階段的參與資格與條件待官方後續公告: Points will be reset in the new round, and the qualifications and conditions for participation in the next stage will be officially announced later.
en\nSBT 等級分為 Elite（前 40%）、Prime（前 10%）、A: SBT levels are divided into three levels: Elite (top 40%), Prime (top 10%), and Apex (top 1%)
en\nGate與Red Bull於2026年4月18日至24日在香港尖沙咀K1: Gate and Red Bull will co-organize the "Racing the Future" exhibition at K11 MUSEA in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong from April 18 to 24, 2026, which is part of the Web3 Festival cycle. There are Formula One themed installations, Gate's 13th anniversary milestone wall and racing car displays on site. When registering for VIP or partner tickets, you need to fill in "Renaiss" in the "Company or Project" field to gain priority admission. The event is open daily from 10 am to 10 pm, and places are limited. This exhibition is an important marketing move for Gate.io to enter the physical event market. The target audience is cryptocurrency investors, Web3 enthusiasts and motor sports fans. You can track whether more details of Renaissance-related cooperation will be released in the future.
en\n展覽時間為2026年4月18日至24日，地點在香港K11 MUSEA，每: The exhibition will be held from April 18 to 24, 2026, at K11 MUSEA, Hong Kong, open 10 hours a day
en\n報名VIP或Partner票券時需填寫「Renaiss」作為公司名稱才能: When registering for VIP or Partner tickets, you must fill in "Renaiss" as your company name to get priority.
en\n報名連結為https://luma.com/bb5l9oa4，建議使用電: The registration link is https://luma.com/bb5l9oa4. It is recommended to register by email to receive confirmation notification.
en\nDiscord 社群舉辦 One Piece 卡牌遊戲直播開包对战活動，: The Discord community held a live pack opening battle event for the One Piece card game. Five contestants each held 3 boxes of card packs (72 packs in total) to compete in rarity. Audiences who participate in the live broadcast interaction or vote to predict the top three can receive Community Rip Pack Event Survivor SBT. Voters also have the opportunity to obtain officially sponsored OP-15 card packs. This event combines the excitement of unboxing with a community prediction game, providing OP card fans with opportunities to watch and interact. Interested players should pay attention to the Discord live link and form filling opening hours on the day of the event.
en\n4月16日 21:00 準時進入 Discord 直播觀看開包对战: Enter the Discord live broadcast at 21:00 on April 16th to watch the pack opening battle.
en\n直播中參與投票預測前三名，有機會獲得 OP-15 卡包: Participate in voting during the live broadcast to predict the top three and have a chance to win OP-15 card pack
en\n完成互動或投票後留意表單開放，領取 Survivor SBT: After completing the interaction or voting, pay attention to the form opening and receive Survivor SBT

The main trigger is SBT. How to obtain SBT: Complete SBT battle missions to unlock the exclusive **"Record Pointer" SBT** qualification... Such activities have clear incentives and usually increase participation rates and community spread.

This player suggested that unlucky participants can try to enter from the secondary market, and revealed that he is looking forward to receiving the physical card. This sharing reflects the price trend of Pokemon SBT in the virtual and real markets, and can be used as a reference for players who are concerned about the investment value of cards.
en\nRenaiss 超夢卡報價約 380u，較購入成本已有明顯漲幅: The Renaiss Chaomeng card is quoted at about 380u, which is a significant increase from the purchase cost.

ko\nShow translation 最近的好消息是 要準備開放領卡了，不過: 최근 반가운 소식은 카드 콜렉션이 곧 오픈된다는 소식인데, 대만 직배송비 + 세금이 모두가 걱정하실 텐데요, 그래서 또 다른 방법인 통합배송을 소개하겠습니다. 아래 공유된 가격은 모두 미국 창고세 1파운드의 가격입니다! 내가 사용한 세 가지 컨테이너 배송 서비스: 1. 구매 및 배송: 가격: 세금 포함 170NTD. 장점: 넓은 공간, 합리적인 가격, 파운드당 파운드, 여러 국가로 배송 가능. 단점: 여러 국가로 반송이 가능하기 때문에 먼저 홍콩으로 갔다가 다시 대만으로 보내는데 14~28일이 소요됩니다. 2. 플래닛 통합: 가격: 세금 포함 170NTD. 장점: BNS처럼 빠르며 많은 국가로 배송이 가능합니다. 단점: 20파운드 미만 주문에는 150NTD의 택배비가 추가로 필요합니다. 3. 행운을 빌어요 통합 배송: 가격: 세금 포함 175NTD 장점: 빠른 속도, 10파운드 이상 단일 배송 시 할인 단점: 현재 본토 및 미국 창고만 있으며, 1파운드만 배송하면 운임은 300입니다. 사용법(BNS를 예로 들어): 등록 후 회원 센터에 들어가 해외 창고 주소를 클릭하면 아래 사진에 주소가 표시됩니다. 르네상스에서 받는 사람과 주소를 입력하면 됩니다. 여기에 자신의 전화번호를 꼭 입력하세요! 기본적으로 모든 사람이 같은 방법을 사용하므로 누구나 추론을 할 수 있다고 믿습니다! 기본적으로 이것으로 충분합니다. 더 궁금한 점이 있으면 다시 질문해 주세요. 시간이 나면 답변해 드리겠습니다. 모든 사람에게 도움이 되기를 바랍니다. 게다가 아직 르네상스에 가입하지 않으신 분들도 제 초대코드를 사용하시면 됩니다~ · 6 3 20 5 읽기 답글 6개

en\n傳統寶可夢 TCG 假貨與高費用問題突顯鏈上方案的潛在機會，可作為後續觀: The problem of fakes and high fees in traditional Pokémon TCG highlights the potential opportunities of on-chain solutions, which can be used as an entry point for subsequent observations.
en\n很高兴看见@gate_ventures提及 renaiss ， 细谈下传:
I'm glad to see @gate_ventures mention renaiss. Let's talk about how painful the secondary market of traditional Pokémon TCG is? ✨ - Counterfeit goods are rampant and difficult to distinguish with the naked eye, and the probability of buying a genuine card is not low - Transactions are slow: it takes 7-14 days for offline meeting or consignment settlement on the platform - Handling fee + shipping fee + arbitration fee exceeds 13% - Poor liquidity, often stuck in hand when trying to sell The most annoying thing is fake goods, which cost a lot of money to buy PSA10 https://t.co/4FoIx2HOiY

🎤 Renaiss Plaza Reminder - See you tonight 🕘 April 17, 21:00 (UTC+8) 📍 Renaiss Discord This time Renaiss will share: • Project data update • SBT 2.0, points and peripherals • Community growth incentive activities • Event sponsorship system • One Piece card drawing machine This time we will also invite a special guest: Ricky - a well-known One Piece TCG collection player Will chat with him: • https://t.co/hNka6Yh1kv

en\nShow translation 最近的好消息是 要準備開放領卡了，不過: Show translation The recent good news is that card collection is about to open, but the direct shipping fee + tax to Taiwan should be something that everyone is concerned about, so let’s introduce another method, which is consolidated shipping. The prices shared below are all the price of one pound of US warehouse tax! Three container shipping services I have used: 1. Buy and Ship: Price: 170NTD including tax. Advantages: Large room, reasonable price, pound for pound, can be shipped back to multiple countries. Disadvantages: Because it can be shipped back to multiple countries, it may go to Hong Kong first, and then sent back to Taiwan, which requires 14 to 28 days. 2. Planet Consolidation: Price: 170NTD including tax. Advantages: Fast, like BNS, many countries can be shipped. Disadvantages: An additional 150NTD home delivery fee is required for orders under 20 pounds. 3. Good Luck Consolidation Shipping: Price: 175NTD including tax Advantages: Fast speed, discounts for single shipments of more than 10 pounds Disadvantages: Currently, there are only mainland and US warehouses, and if only 1 pound is shipped, the freight is 300 Usage (take BNS as an example): After registration, enter the member center, click on the overseas warehouse address, and you will see the address in the picture below. Just fill in the recipient and address in renaiss. Be sure to fill in your own number here! Basically, every one uses the same method, I believe everyone can draw inferences! Basically this is enough. If you have any more questions, you can ask me again. I will answer them when I have time. I hope it helps everyone. In addition, those who have not joined renaiss are also welcome to use my invitation code~ · 6 3 20 5 Read 6 replies
